如今，“永不落幕的盛典”这句说法已不再只是诗意的比喻。两百年以前，波比·冯·藤壶的船员后裔的第一代人设立了一项一年两次的节庆，名为“永不落幕的盛典”——为期一周、庆祝朗普兰克万事万物的盛大狂欢，包含游行、化装舞会与盛宴。朗普兰克那点称得上产业的东西，很大一部分都围绕着这一古老根源而运转：为了这场庆典，人们会建造数十辆花车、船只、雕塑与建筑结构，而在节庆结束时又将其拆毁。如今，这场著名的庆祝被简称为“内瓦拉”，其规模之大，足以把来自整个靛蓝群岛的数千名朝圣般的派对旅人带到朗普兰克的海岸。为期一周的庆典过后，新手狂欢者往往需要长达六个月才能从不间断的派对中恢复过来——时间刚好够他们准备迎接下一次内瓦拉。

朗普兰克其他著名的节日还包括建城者之日、波比之夜、夏月节与复兴之日，等等。尽管这些场合都比不上内瓦拉那种酒神般的混沌狂欢，但每一个都作为受人敬重的朗普兰克根源而各有其位置。

建城者之日纪念据说波比创建朗普兰克城的那一天。考虑到在此之前朗普兰克就已作为一处小村存在（至少按照我跟你提过的那些历史学家的说法），这严格说来也许不算“建城”，但市民们就是想庆祝——而且他们确实会大肆庆祝。建城者之日有各式各样的比赛，用以追忆这位建城者的英勇事迹，其中最著名的是“朗姆奔跑”：一项醉醺醺的障碍赛。建城者之日也是除内瓦拉之外规模最大的游行日——这对游行产业而言是个幸运的恩惠，否则那段时间本该是他们的淡季。波比之夜则是在炽焰草甸举行的春日采集活动，届时数以千计的花朵盛开——当然也包括数十个品种的罂粟——宣告岛屿旱季的到来。小吃贩会拿出他们整个冬天储存的剩余蜜饯与腌制品，举办一场纪念波比·冯·藤壶遗泽的盛宴；与此同时，孩子们穿着金黑相间的服装四处奔跑，学着他们最拿手的“镀金海盗”腔调大喊大叫。夏月节与之相似，不过其根源来自古老的格梅云德鲁伊信仰——那是该族群从遥远故土携来的传统。即便对当代朗普兰克中追随名为“长古者”的古老元素宗教的信徒而言，这些特定的格梅云信仰细节也已在时代的流逝中遗失，因此如今的夏月仪式与其说是原真复演，不如说更像拼贴的仿作。尽管如此，德鲁伊与秘法研究者仍坚持认为，这场神圣的月相纪念能取悦大地，并赋予靛蓝群岛众多艾达魔（那些栖居于生物、地点与事物之中的元素怪物——你肯定早就知道这些吧？）与维泰（有时被称为自然灵体；它们会回应德鲁伊的询问，并塑成蕾希的形态——也就是聪慧的植物，在靛蓝群岛尤为常见）以力量。

复兴之日标志着许多人所认为的新年伊始，也是朗普兰克唯一一个实际上会劝阻豪饮的节日；为了迎接新年，朗普兰克人会亲自彻底清理他们的住处、街道，以及他们的肝脏。尽管在朗普兰克的大多数地方，慈善与邻里之爱全年都在践行，但在复兴之日这些美德尤为重要——即便是积怨深重的宿敌，也会暂时放下分歧，去帮助有需要的人。

The very concept of festivals is a bit alien to us Rumplankers, since we see every day as a holiday and every breath of fresh air as a reason to celebrate. Carnivals, jubilees, and observances would easily fill the calendars of Rumplankers if anyone bothered to keep such time-trackers. Rather, most citizens are content to bumble from one social occasion to another with little sense of propriety or timeliness. Even short-time visitors to Rumplank discover something special about the city, which has the effect of inducing a kind of natural high without the need for spirits or mind-altering substances (though many Rumplankers enjoy these things as well). Long-time residents of Goldcrop Island call this special state of exuberance and good cheer "the never-ending gala" or "the buoyant heart." To say that someone has a buoyant heart is to say that they are free of worry, that they have decided to give their whole heart to others, and that they have given up their worries in exchange for life's many joys.

These days, the expression "the never-ending gala" is no longer mere poetry. Two hundred years ago, the first generation of descendants of Poppy von Barnacle's crew established a twice-per-year festival called the Never-ending Gala—a week-long celebration of all things Rumplank, featuring parades, masquerades, and feasts. Much of Rumplank's industry, such as it is, centers on this time-honored tradition, for which dozens of floats, ships, sculptures, and structures are constructed only to be torn down at the end of the festivities. Nowadays, the famous celebration is called simply Nevala, and the occasion is so massive that it brings thousands of party pilgrims from around the Indigo Isles to Rumplank's shores. In the aftermath of the week-long jubilee, it can take novice revelers up to six months to recuperate from the non-stop partying—just enough time to get ready for the next Nevala.

Other famous Rumplank holidays include Founder's Day, Poppy Nights, the Summer Moon Festival, and Restoration Day, among others. Though none of these occasions can match the dionysian chaos of Nevala, each has its place as an honored Rumplank tradition.

Founder's Day marks the occasion when Poppy supposedly founded the city of Rumplank. Given the prior existence of Rumplank as a hamlet (at least according to those historians I've been telling you about), it may not technically be a founding, but citizens want to celebrate anyway, and celebrate they do. Founder's Day has all sorts of contests, to remember the heroic deeds of the city's founder, most notably the Rum Run, a drunken obstacle course. Founder's Day is also the occasion for the biggest parade outside of Nevala, a fortunate boon for the parade industry in what would otherwise be their off-season. Poppy Nights is a springtime gathering held in Blazing Meadow, where thousands of flowers—including, of course, dozens of species of poppies—bloom and usher in the island's dry season. Food hawkers break out the remainder of the preserves they stored all winter for a feast in honor of Poppy von Barnacle's legacy; meanwhile, children run around in gold-and-black costumes and holler their best Gilded Pirate impressions. The Summer Moon Festival is a similar affair, though its roots stem from old g'mayun druidic beliefs carried over from that people's distant homeland. Even to modern Rumplanker followers of the ancient elemental religion known as the Eld, the specifics of these particular g'mayun beliefs have been lost to time, so the current Summer Moon rites are more pastiche than authentic reenactment. Nevertheless, druids and occultists insist that the sacred lunar observance pleases the land and gives power to the Indigo Isles' many eldamon (all those elemental monsters that dwell in creatures, places, and things—surely you knew that much already?) and vitae (sometimes called nature spirits, they answer druid's queries and form into leshies, intelligent plants who are especially common in the Indigo Isles).

Restoration Day marks the beginning of what many consider to be the new year, and it's the only Rumplank holiday in which imbibement is actually discouraged; to usher in the new year, Rumplankers take it upon themselves to do a thorough cleaning of their domiciles, their streets, and their livers. Though charity and neighborly love are practiced year-round in most of Rumplank, such merits are particularly important on Restoration Day, when even bitter rivals put aside their differences in order to help those in need.

Notable Inhabitants.name: 著名居民 Notable Inhabitants
Notable Inhabitants.text:
伦普兰克多元的社区由根基深厚的家族、定期轮换的一批海船长及其船员，以及来自各行各业的新人组成……再加上一群其他人，比如像我这样的人！以下是镇上最值得注意的一些人物。

Rumplank's diverse community comprises well-established families, a regularly rotating cast of sea captains and their crews, and newcomers from all walks of life… plus a bunch of other folk, like yours truly! The following are some of the town's most noteworthy personalities.

The Royal Redfeathers.name: 皇家红羽团 The Royal Redfeathers
The Royal Redfeathers.text:
伦普兰克中那点为数不多的官方秩序，主要源于其最古老且最强大的家族——红羽家族——的努力。国王奥凯奇·红羽——伦普兰克第一位君主、在“伦普兰克文艺复兴”期间被立为统治者的基莉女士的玄玄孙——是伦普兰克现任统治者；然而，几乎所有艰难的决策都由他的妻子做出，而他众多的顾问与指挥官则处理大多数平凡的日常事务。奥凯奇国王让自己的王座紧挨着他挚爱妻子同样奢华的座位。尽管奥凯奇或许是伦普兰克王室的门面，但除名义之外，王后才是镇子真正的领导者。凡由奥凯奇国王签署的任何法令，都由马克塞尔王后勤勉的手笔撰写或大幅修订。每一次外交会晤、公开典礼或王室远征之前与之后，她也都会为丈夫出谋划策；在危机时期，若来不及教丈夫如何应对，她有时甚至会干脆亲自作出决定或发布公告。奥凯奇对马克塞尔心怀感激，而我们伦普兰克的所有人也不会因他相对的无能而责怪他——很明显，奥凯奇爱他的城镇，几乎如同他爱妻子一般。他们的爱情故事漫长而幸福，但这也超出了这本简朴城市指南的范围。

总体而言，伦普兰克的人民尊敬他们的国王，并爱戴他们的王后。然而，真正激励金作物农夫们为保卫伦普兰克与王室而不惜赴死的，是统治者的女儿。阿特里埃拉公主大胆而勇敢，才华横溢，却也有些过于急于冲进任何局面，只为保护他人或制止恶行——这曾让她在过去把自己逼得太紧。正因如此，伦普兰克的许多人都很喜欢她；尽管在一对一决斗中她几乎能击败绝大多数居民，但鉴于她总爱把自己置于险境的倾向，人们仍不由得对她多几分保护欲；而当她在下一场重大冒险中陷入棘手处境时，人们也总是渴望伸出援手帮她一把。

另一方面，库鲁皮王子在统治与制定政策方面严肃而称职。尽管他在协助父母时取得了许多成功，他却不如姐姐受欢迎，因为大多数伦普兰克人更愿意与一个乐天开朗、先跳再看的冒险者相处，而不是与一个用功的规划者为伴。虽然当伦普兰克人践踏他的贡献时，他会明显感到恼火，但他从不因姐姐的人气而心生怨怼，且人人都看得出他有多在乎她。库鲁皮王子为伦普兰克带来了一次又一次的成功、一项又一项的创新；即便屡遭冷遇，他似乎也从未放弃希望。他还想做得更多，而传闻说，他希望在不久的将来找到一些冒险者，去执行一场盛大的英雄任务。

What little official order exists in Rumplank is largely a result of the efforts of its oldest and most powerful family, the Redfeathers. King Okeki Redfeather—the great-great-grandson of the first monarch of Rumplank, Lady Kili, instituted as ruler during the Rumplank Renaissance—is the current ruler of Rumplank, though his wife makes nearly all of the difficult decisions while his many advisors and commanders take care of most of the mundane day-to-day affairs. King Okeki keeps his throne positioned close to the equally lavish seat of his beloved wife, Queen Maxelle Redfeather. Although Okeki may be the face of Rumplank's royal family, his queen is the town's actual leader in everything but name. Any decrees signed by King Okeki are written or heavily edited by Queen Maxelle's assiduous hand. She also advises her husband before and after every diplomatic meeting, public ceremony, or royal expedition, and in times of crisis she sometimes just flat out makes the decisions or proclamations herself, when there isn't time to coach her husband through it. Okeki is grateful to Maxelle, and all of us in Rumplank don't begrudge him his relative ineptitude—it's plain that Okeki loves his town nearly as much as he does his wife. Their love story is a long and happy one, but also beyond the scope of this humble guide to the city.

In general, the people of Rumplank respect their king and adore their queen. It is the rulers' daughter, however, who inspires Goldcroppers to put their lives on the line to defend Rumplank and the royal family. Princess Atriella is daring and courageous, extremely talented, but a little too ready to rush into any situation in order to protect others or stop villainy, which has caused her to overextend herself in the past. Many of us in Rumplank are quite fond of her for that reason, and though she could beat almost all of the residents in a one-on-one duel, they still can't help but feel a bit protective given her tendency to get herself into danger, as well as eager to lend her a helping hand when she gets in over her head with her next big adventure.

Prince Kulupi, on the other hand, is serious and competent when it comes to ruling and policymaking. Though he's had many successes in assisting his parents, he's not as popular as his sister because most Rumplankers would rather hang out with a happy-go-lucky adventurer who leaps before she looks than a studious planner. While he gets visibly annoyed when Rumplankers stomp over his contributions, he never begrudges his sister for her popularity, and it's clear to everyone how much he cares for her. Prince Kulupi has brought success after success, and innovation after innovation to Rumplank, but even after being rebuffed, he never seems to give up hoping. He's looking to do more, and there's rumors he's hoping to find some adventurers for a big heroic quest in the near future.

Business As Usual.name: 一切照常 Business As Usual
Business As Usual.text:
朗普兰克人以不间断的狂欢作乐而闻名，这名声或许实至名归，但我们那种“管他魔鬼”的态度不该被误解为懒惰。朗普兰克的工业与商业脉动，丝毫不输任何其他重要港口城市。正如朗普兰克的一句俗语所说：“铁锤或酒杯——对游手好闲的羽毛来说，握柄的触感都一样。”

城里唯一的带扣匠是一名叫斯瓦哈的格玛尤恩男子，他与镇上最好的皮匠——一名叫加皮的格玛尤恩女子——维系着一段岌岌可危的合作关系。斯瓦哈过去常把大量带扣批发卖给加皮，但最近这位带扣匠换了买家。如今他把货卖给皮革行当里的新来者——一名精明的格玛尤恩女鞣皮匠伊希奇；她能带来大量廉价皮革……只是其来源颇为可疑。加皮怀疑斯瓦哈的新买家有问题，但斯瓦哈却把这位老朋友的话不当回事，声称她只是嫉妒。加皮正在寻找私家侦探暗中调查此事，别让斯瓦哈察觉风声。

贾拉尔皮·快刀是一位爱抽雪茄的格玛尤恩女商人，经营着覆盖整个靛蓝群岛的最大木材产业。她在城镇与逃亡丛林之间的锯木厂中指挥这一切。造船匠们对贾拉尔皮的优质木材赞不绝口，但并非所有人都对快刀公司感到满意；贾拉尔皮最近的伐木项目引发了研究者德玛尔蒂·蒂希玛的强烈愤怒——一群快刀公司的伐木工在开始皆伐前“忘了”勘察区域，导致他在帐篷里差点被倒下的树木压死。

永不出航船长是一名行迹可疑的格玛尤恩男子，靠炼金术为生，却自称是见多识广的水手，尽管他从未离开过金穗岛一步。朗普兰克的每个人似乎都知道这一点——除了永不出航本人；他原名内拉德，但其真正来历却如同蓝铃棉般厚重的一层谜团所笼罩。朗普兰克人起初以嘲讽之意把这个病态说谎者叫作“永不出航船长”，但这个名字流传得太广，以至于连永不出航自己都忘了那只是个绰号。凡是能忍受他嘶嘶作响的嗓音与令人厌恶的酗酒习惯的人（永不出航几乎从不离身地带着一只半空的茴香味黄色利口酒酒壶，还坚称那是“药用的”），都将迎来一段相当刺激的旅程：这位船长在调制药水方面的天赋令人存疑，但他编织的故事却是真正的奇观，其广度与规模甚至足以与波比·冯·藤壶最恢弘的传奇史诗相媲美。

Rumplankers' reputation for non-stop partying may be well earned, but our devil-may-care attitudes shouldn't be mistaken for sloth. Rumplank pulses with as much industry and commerce as any other major port city. As one Rumplank aphorism puts it, "Hammer or tankard—the handle feels the same to idle feathers."

The city's sole buckle maker, a g'mayun man named Swaha, has a tenuous partnership with the town's best leatherworker, a g'mayun woman named Gappi. Swaha used to sell lots of buckles wholesale to Gappi, but recently the buckle maker switched buyers. Now he sells to a newcomer in the leather game—a savvy female g'mayun tanner named Ixichi, who brings in plentiful cheap leather… though it's of questionable provenance. Gappi suspects something is up with Swaha's new buyer, but Swaha dismisses his old friend and claims she's simply jealous. Gappi is seeking private investigators to look into the matter without Swaha catching wind.

Jalarpi Quick-Cutter is a cigar-smoking g'mayun businesswoman who runs the biggest lumber operation throughout the entire Indigo Isles. She does so from her mill between town and the Runaway Jungle. Shipwrights swear by Jalarpi's excellent lumber, but not everyone is thrilled by the Quick-Cutter Company; Jalarpi's most recent logging project has drawn considerable ire from the researcher D'marti Tixima, who was nearly crushed to death in their tent when a group of Quick-Cutter lumberers "forgot" to scout the area before starting to clear cut.

Captain Nevergo is a sketchy g'mayun man who works as an alchemist while claiming to be a well-versed sailor, despite the fact that he's never once set foot off Goldcrop Island. Everyone in Rumplank seems to know this but Nevergo himself, whose original name was Nellard yet whose true origins are shrouded in a layer of mystery as thick as Bluebell cotton. Rumplankers began calling the pathological liar "Captain Nevergo" in mockery, but the name stuck to such an extent that even Nevergo forgot it was a nickname. Those who can bear the man's hissing voice and unsavory drinking habits (Nevergo is rarely seen without a half-empty flask of anise-flavored yellow liqueur he insists is for medicinal purposes) are in for quite a ride: The captain's gift for potion-mixing is suspect, but the yarns he weaves are true things of wonder, rivaling in scope and scale even the most awesome sagas of Poppy von Barnacle.

Adventurers, Present And Past.name: 冒险者，今昔 Adventurers, Present And Past
Adventurers, Present And Past.text:
无数人扬帆前往Rumplank，追寻名声、财富与冒险。另一方面，也同样有许多人选择这处宁静的港湾来养老，或从精彩纷呈的一生中抽空休息。

D'marti Tixima是一位性别流动的g'mayun游侠，曾在学校里求学多年，盼望成为著名的考古学家或历史学家，却发现世上所有的书都无法帮助他们真正达成宏伟目标——唯有纵身一跃、走向世界才行。如今，D'marti在Goldcrop Island的荒野间四处搜寻失落的宝藏、隐秘的遗迹与历史文物。他们的工作绝不轻松，而D'marti惹上麻烦的本事远胜于其考古才能；但这位爱做白日梦的年轻g'mayun相信，他们终于在Rumplank找到了可以称作家的地方。当他们不在丛林荒地中披荆斩棘时，人们常能在Rumpled Feather见到D'marti与其挚友Og'matu作伴；又或——在近几个月里更常见——他们在Greensand Corral外踱步，鼓起勇气想与那位美丽的海豚驯养首领搭话：一位名叫Lutilu的hypisk chochori。哦，你不了解chochori以及他们不同的chori？别担心，你并不孤单。不那么精明的本地人很难分辨一位chochori的chora与其性格的差异，但我向你保证，Lutilu是hypisk——与水相关、沉思而温和的chora。在这些页面里，我为你标注的每一位重要chochori的chori都百分之百保真，因此如果你恰好会说Chochori语，你可以放心用它们来变位形容词与动词！

Rumpled Feather的主人是Clamardinia Wakamarsis，一位近来因多次为人称道的壮举而备受喜爱的非二元g'mayun前船长。Clamardinia——朋友们叫她Dini——已从航海生涯退休，如今掌管着镇上最受欢迎的酒馆。Dini头号生意对手是Molo "Make-Sick" Dogodor，一名经营全镇最差酒吧“Gutted Snake”的g'mayun男子。说实话，要不是后者坚持散布关于Rumpled Feather“闹鬼”储藏室的诽谤流言，或宣扬有关Dini已故兄长死亡“真相”的残酷阴谋论，Dini根本不会跟Molo多说一句话。就连Gutted Snake那些鬼祟的常客也觉得他们那位臭气熏天的酒保在散播流言时往往过火，然而没人敢出声，唯恐自己也招来他的虐待。令人不安的是，种种迹象显示Molo的抱怨或许确有几分真实；当然，即便如此，事情也必定比Molo的说法所呈现的要复杂得多。

还有无数其他Rumplank人各自背负神秘过往，或各自有着维持（或放弃）冒险人生的理由。例如，没有人知道那位著名音乐家——名为T.Q. Kekar的orpok男子——天赋从何而来。他带着一把可疑的魔法小提琴横空出世，在Rumplank各家酒馆间固定巡演，却从不留下加演。前文提到的那位由巫师转行酿酒的Og'matu——一名g'mayun男子，也是D'marti Tixima的朋友——便是本地人口中“被岛屿拒绝”的例子；一年多前，他在Wriggling Swamp失去了所有书籍、魔法器具与冒险队伍后，这位初出茅庐的施法者别无选择，只得在岛上最刻薄的啤酒酿造师门下当学徒：名为Begebosos Grogwort的orpok女子。极具讽刺的是，尽管Og'matu渴望回到他作为巫术学生的生活，他却未能意识到他的女主人正是Indigo Isles最优秀的olfamancy魔法艺术导师之一。亲爱的读者，别告诉他；这样更好笑！

Countless people sail to Rumplank in search of fame, fortune, and adventure. On the other hand, just as many individuals choose the peaceful harbor for their retirement or to take a rest from a life well lived.

D'marti Tixima, a genderfluid g'mayun ranger, attended school for many years in the hopes of becoming a famous archaeologist or historian, only to discover that all the books in the world wouldn't help them actually achieve their grand goals—only taking the plunge and stepping out into the world would do that. Now, D'marti scours the wilds of Goldcrop Island in search of lost treasures, hidden ruins, and historical artifacts. Their work is far from easy, and D'marti's knack for getting into trouble far exceeds their actual talent at archeology, but the daydreaming young g'mayun believes they've finally found in Rumplank a place to call home. When they're not forging a path through the jungle outlands, D'marti can often be found in the company of their best friend Og'matu at the Rumpled Feather or—more frequently in recent months— pacing outside the Greensand Corral as they work up the courage to speak to the beautiful head dolphin wrangler, a hypisk chochori named Lutilu. Oh, you don't know about chochori and their different chori? Don't worry, you're not alone. Less savvy locals have trouble telling a chochori's chora from their personality, but I assure you, Lutilu is hypisk, the contemplative and gentle chora associated with water. All the chori I'll indicate to you for notable chochori in these pages have my 100% guarantee, so you can use them confidently to conjugate adjectives and verbs if you happen to speak Chochori!

The Rumpled Feather is owned by one Clamardinia Wakamarsis, a nonbinary g'mayun ex-captain with several recent beloved exploits. Clamardinia—Dini to her friends—has retired from seafaring and now oversees the most popular tavern in town. Dini's number one business rival is Molo "Make-Sick" Dogodor, a g'mayun man who runs the worst bar in town, the Gutted Snake. In truth, Dini wouldn't have two words for Molo if the latter didn't insist on spreading slanderous rumors about the Rumpled Feather's "haunted" pantries or cruel conspiracy theories about the "truth" behind the death of Dini's dearly departed brother. Even the Gutted Snake's shady patrons think their malodorous barkeep often goes too far with his rumor mongering, though no one speaks up for fear of engendering his abuse themselves. Disturbingly, there are signs that Molo's grumblings might have some real truth to them, though of course, if so, the situation must be far more complicated than it seems from Molo's narrative.

Countless other Rumplankers have their own mysterious pasts, or their own reasons for maintaining (or giving up) the adventuring life. No one knows, for instance, the source of the talent of the famous musician, an orpok man named T.Q. Kekar. He came out of nowhere with a suspicious magical fiddle and plays a steady circuit among Rumplank's taverns, yet never stays for encores. The aforementioned wizard-turned-brewer Og'matu, a g'mayun man and friend of D'marti Tixima, is an example of someone who has been "rejected by the island," in the parlance of locals; when he lost all his books, magical apparatuses, and adventuring party in the Wriggling Swamp over a year ago, the upstart spellcaster had no choice but to accept an apprenticeship under the meanest beer brewer on the island, an orpok woman named Begebosos Grogwort. It is a great irony that while Og'matu would love to return to his life as a student of wizardry, he fails to realize that his mistress is one of the Indigo Isles' very best teachers of the magical art of olfamancy. Don't tell him, dear reader; it's funnier this way!

Gazetteer.name: 地名志 Gazetteer
Gazetteer.text:
从一个昏昏欲睡的渔村这般不起眼的起源出发，鲁姆普兰克在过去两个半世纪里蓬勃发展，绽放为一座繁华的城市，遍布著名而引人入胜的地点。我们鲁姆普兰克人从不自称是出色的建筑师或一丝不苟的城市规划者，而这也反映在其街道与建筑自然而有机的风貌上。以打磨过的熔岩石铺就的人行道与走廊，缠绕在圆形小屋与木制棚屋之间——前者由本地棕榈树搭建，后者则分别由打捞来的漂流木制成；与此同时，名为塔鲁基的坚固石造建筑仍在城中零星矗立，见证着鲁姆普兰克的远古过往。鲁姆普兰克可去之处与可观之物的惊人多样性，使它成为无数人所钟爱的家园或惬意的度假去处：从寻求刺激、纵身跃下海边峭壁并在星空下过夜的人，到更偏爱宁静、住在一间俯瞰沙滩的小屋中的隐士，皆能在此找到归处。

以下内容将描述鲁姆普兰克最著名的场所，并分为三类：城市划分出的各个街区、城市所依托的自然地理，以及“色彩之城”周边数十处最重要或最值得一提的地点。逗留期间务必把它们都逛一遍！

From its humble origins as a sleepy fishing hamlet, Rumplank has blossomed over the past two and a half centuries into a thriving city full of famous and fascinating locations. We Rumplankers have never claimed to be excellent architects or fastidious city planners, and this is reflected in the organic nature of its streets as well as its structures. Walkways and corridors paved with smoothed lava rocks tangle around circular huts and wooden shacks made from native palm trees or salvaged driftwood, respectively, while here and there formidable stone buildings called taruki still stand from Rumplank's ancient past. Rumplank's sheer variety of places to go and things to see makes it a beloved home or pleasing getaway for countless types of folks, from thrill seekers who jump off seaside cliffs and spend their nights under the stars to recluses who prefer the tranquility of a little hut overlooking a sandy beach.

The following are descriptions of Rumplank's most famous venues, separated into three categories: the various quarters into which the city is divided, the natural geography upon which the city is built, and several dozen of the most important or noteworthy locales around the City of Color. Be sure to check all of them out during your stay!

Districts.name: 城区 Districts
Districts.text:
鲁姆普兰克的城市分区（姑且称之为分区）只是松散界定的各处区域，主要以其独特的建筑风格与典型居民来区分。只有少数分区拥有清晰可辨的边界，而这些边界通常是地理性的而非市政性的，例如喙爆丘陵的多风峭壁，或双爪的高耸岩柱。最古老的分区理所当然地被称为旧鲁姆普兰克，而从这一中心点向外延伸的是城市较新的街区；这些街区合在一起，讲述着鲁姆普兰克的发展故事，就像人们可用树干的年轮来判断一棵树的年代一样。

Rumplank's city districts, such as they are, are loosely defined localities marked primarily by their distinct architectural styles and typical inhabitants. Only a few districts have clearly discernible boundaries, which are typically geographic rather than civic, such as the windy cliffs of Beakbluster Hills or the towering rock pillars of Twin Talons. The oldest district is, fittingly, called Old Rumplank, and from this central point radiate the city's newer quarters, which altogether tell the story of Rumplank's development much like a trunk's rings can be used to tell a tree's age.

Barrel Square.name: 桶形广场 Barrel Square
Barrel Square.text:
镇上的老人们也称这里为“新朗姆普兰克”，桶广场及其周边的市集摊位、食物小屋和木屋，让人得以一窥这座小镇在大多数外乡人眼中的模样——喧闹的派对、美味的食物与奢华的放松之地。无论你是在狩猎由本地工匠制作的新冒险道具，想吃朗姆普兰克著名的椰香油炸帕亚约斯，还是想租一间上层的平房，在靠近市中心的地方小憩数小时，桶广场都是你该去的地方。

这个街区因其中心那座由朗姆酒桶围成的四方场而得名。农夫市集与手工艺品售卖在工作日清晨填满广场，但到了傍晚时分，摊位都会被清空，以腾出空间供人社交与公共集会。较小的节庆或周末庆祝活动，例如婚礼与生日派对，往往至少有一部分会在桶广场举行。这片四方场也是朗姆普兰克许多最富传奇色彩的旅游景点所在地，其中包括粉水井、迷失歌者大厅，以及镀金海盗雕像。

Also called "New Rumplank" by the town's old-timers, Barrel Square and its surrounding market stalls, food huts, and wooden houses offer a glimpse of the town as most foreigners know it—a place for raucous parties, delicious food, and sumptuous relaxation. If you're on the hunt for new adventuring gear made by one of the local artisans, you're hankering for some of Rumplank's famous coconut-fried payayos, or you want to rent an upper-floor bungalow to crash for a few hours while staying close to the city center, Barrel Square is the place to go.

The quarter is named for the rum-barrel-lined quadrangle at its center. Farmers' markets and craft sales fill the square on weekday mornings, but by late afternoon, the stalls are all cleared to make space for socializing and public gatherings. Smaller holidays or weekend celebrations, such as weddings and birthday parties, often take place at least partly in Barrel Square. The quad is also home to many of Rumplank's most storied tourist attractions, including Pinkwater Well Lost Crooner's Hall, and the Gilded Pirate statue.

Beakbluster Hills.name: 喙爆丘陵 Beakbluster Hills
Beakbluster Hills.text:
在鲁普兰克，几乎没有哪里的住宅和商铺能比得上“喙风丘陵”两旁那一栋栋多层庄园与仿制塔鲁基。尽管该区得名于从藤壶湾吹来的相对劲风，但这里最为人所知的，还是其相对集中的财富。鲁普兰克的大多数“老钱”都住在此处，而这座城市宽松的税制确保富人依旧富有，往往连手指都不用抬一下。即便如此，大多数鲁普兰克人并不怨恨居住在喙风丘陵的贵族与巨富，因为钱在这座城市的以物易物经济中并不真正扮演特别重要的角色。事实上，低地居民往往会带着一丝悲伤甚至怜悯看待我们的高地邻居，因为（以鲁普兰克的标准而言）上层阶级的鲁普兰克人过着孤独的生活，而且显然与他们的平民亲族脱节。丘陵居民的“富裕病”严重到让人难以行动，有些财阀甚至会付钱雇平民进城，带回工艺品或小零嘴——这些东西在其他鲁普兰克人眼里不过是理所当然之物。更常见的是，喙风社区那些无聊的住户会采取行动，只为让自己的口袋塞进更多财富，通常做法是雇用冒险者去追踪并带回散落在金穗岛屿各处的隐藏宝藏。对于正在寻找新任务或线索的丛林探险家与宝藏猎人而言，去向喙风丘陵那些古板的贵族请教、或翻阅他们的私人藏书，怎么都不算差。或者，他们也可以投身喙风丘陵利润丰厚的安保行业，因为这里的富裕居民为了确保贵重物品安全从不吝惜花费。

Homes and businesses in Rumplank don't get much posher than the multi-story manors and imitation tarukis that line Beakbluster Hills. Though the district is named for the relatively brisk winds that sweep in from Barnacle Bay, the place is best known for its relative concentration of wealth. Most of Rumplank's "old money" lives here, and the city's lax system of taxation ensures that the rich stay rich, often without so much as lifting a finger. Still, most Rumplankers don't begrudge the aristocrats and magnates who dwell in Beakbluster Hills, for money doesn't actually play a particularly strong role in the city's barter economy. In fact, lowland dwellers tend to regard our upland neighbors with a twinge of sadness or even pity, for the upper-class Rumplankers lead lonely lives (by Rumplank standards) and are clearly out of touch with their commonfolk kin. Hill dwellers' affluenza is so crippling that some of these plutocrats even pay commoners to go into town and bring back crafts or morsels that other Rumplankers take for granted. More often, though, bored residents of the Beakbluster community take strides only to further line their pockets with ever more wealth, typically by employing adventurers to track down and bring back hidden treasures all around Goldcrop Island. Jungle explorers and treasure hunters in search of a new quest or lead can do far worse than to pick the brains or peruse the private libraries of Beakbluster Hills' stuffy patricians. Alternatively, they could serve in Beakbluster Hills' lucrative security industry, as the wealthy inhabitants spare no expense in keeping their valuables safe.

Claw Quarter.name: 爪击四分之一 Claw Quarter
Claw Quarter.text:
把爪击区称作“粗野混战”，至少可以说还是说得太温和了。尽管朗普兰克人通常都很友善，多彩之城仍然聚集着相当数量的闹事者与破坏规矩的人，其中许多人就住在可说是朗普兰克最危险的城区。这里，毫无戒心的行人既可能被偷窃成性的孩子掏走钱袋，也同样可能惹上地盘意识强烈的海盗帮派。骗子、假神父与江湖术士遍布爪击区肮脏蜿蜒的街道每一个角落。仿佛这里的典型居民还不够劝退人一般，爪击区的内陆位置也使其成为朗普兰克最恶劣天气模式的法器——一种闷热、毛毛雨不断、并且终年阴云密布的局地气候。既然这么粗野，你或许会想，那为什么还有人会来爪击区呢？

但尽管危害重重，爪击区也坐落着朗普兰克一些最缤纷、最有创意，甚至最可爱的场所。算命师与读心术士、驯服鲨鱼并与章鱼摔跤的街头艺人、制作魔法蜡烛与绚丽羽毛染料的工匠——这些以及更多人，都在弯曲露台沿线的公寓楼与采集大厅里谋生。向南走，主街转入臭名昭著的朗姆街时，无论勇者还是蠢人，都可以尝试直接从源头购买朗普兰克的蒸馏出口酒；而向西，胆子大、胃口更强的人或许真能在铁盐湾的残渣漂浮物中找到自己的财路。

与所有地方一样，爪击区的真相介于两种极端叙事之间。在任意一条街上，你很可能会发现这边是一处非法的血鼠斗场，那边却是一家慈善孤儿院。对于那些不介意偶尔要应付一群血鼠、暴力的巷道劫匪，或一堆摇摇晃晃的活垃圾的人而言，爪击区会是个热闹又刺激、值得消磨时间的地方。

To call the Claw Quarter "rough and tumble" would certainly be putting it gently, to say the least. Though Rumplankers are a benevolent bunch as a rule, the City of Color is still home to its fair share of rabble-rousers and rulebreakers, many of whom dwell in what is arguably Rumplank's most dangerous district. Here, the unwary pedestrian is as likely to be pickpocketed by thieving children as they are to run afoul of territorial pirate gangs. Confidence artists, false priests, and charlatans dot every corner along the filthy, winding streets of the Claw Quarter. As if its typical residents weren't dissuasive enough, Claw Quarter's inland location also makes it the locus of Rumplank's foulest weather patterns—a muggy, drizzly, and perpetually overcast microclimate. If it's so rough, then, you might wonder, why does anyone ever visit the Claw Quarter at all?

But for all its hazards, Claw Quarter is also home to some of Rumplank's most colorful, creative, and even lovely venues. Fortune tellers and mentalists, street performers who tame sharks and wrestle octopuses, artisans who craft magic candles and dazzling feather dyes—all these and more make their livings in the tenement buildings and gathering halls along the Crooked Terrace. To the south, where the main street turns into the infamous Rum Row, the brave and the foolish alike can attempt to purchase some of Rumplank's distilled exports straight from the source, while to the west, those with strong stomachs can quite possibly find their fortunes floating among the detritus of Ironsalt Cove.

As in all places, the truth of Claw Quarter lies somewhere between the two extreme narratives. On any given street, one is apt to discover an illegal blood mouse fighting ring on one side and a benevolent orphanage on the other. For those who don't mind contending with the occasional swarm of blood mice, violent alleyway mugger, or lurching mound of living trash, Claw Quarter can be a lively and exciting place to spend one's time.

Old Rumplank.name: 老朗姆木板 Old Rumplank
Old Rumplank.text:
在最早的时代，那些穿着花哨裤子的历史学家说，朗普兰克不过是巴纳克尔湾最大一段海滨沙滩上方的一片青草坡上，沿坡搭起的几排小屋而已。一条泥路从小屋间蜿蜒而出，穿过沙质草地，通向两座摇摇欲坠的码头；在那儿，同时系泊超过六码头小船的景象都很罕见。最初的朗普兰克人还在迷雾河注入海湾之处，用熔岩岩石建起了另外数十座建筑——他们称这些建筑为塔鲁基——但除了这些与他们朴素的居住区之外，这片地区大多只是嶙峋的黑色岩石、杂草丛生的海滩，以及野性的丛林灌木。

随后，巴纳克尔的波比·冯驾驶船只驶入海湾，在沙质海岸登陆，并立刻将其命名为宝藏海滩。几乎就在瞬间，这位镀金的海盗与她令人印象深刻的船员们，永远改变了这座沉睡港镇的面貌。

如今仍留存的朗普兰克“波比之前”的遗产，大多可在现称“旧朗普兰克”的地方找到。在这里，古老的格迈云与奥尔波克根源相对未受侵扰，未被这座城市其余地区那种几乎每周都会改变态度与时尚的国际化影响所改造。严苛的地方法律与对城市历史的尊重，使得任何新建筑都无法在旧朗普兰克内兴建，尽管那里的宽阔草坪与柔软沙地显然足以容纳更多建筑。石匠们以受敬重的塔鲁基工艺修缮既有的熔岩石建筑；而木制建筑则会定期以新砍的棕榈树与交织的棕榈叶进行维护。这里的建筑主要由私人住宅、小型神社、工匠小屋，以及收集并分享食物的场所构成；东侧还有一段杂乱无章的“醉汉墙”，那是曾试图在聚落周围建墙的遗迹。旧朗普兰克内部以赋礼为核心的微型经济，使得交易在此成了一种失礼之举；在这里，以物易物来交换货物与服务，比起使用钱币或黄金进行交换要更为得体。

与桶广场和爪击区所展现的那种“管他呢”的狂欢气氛——这正是现代朗普兰克闻名之处——不同，旧朗普兰克让人得以一窥更平静、更含蓄的过去：那里更强调与家人相伴、帮助社区，并放慢脚步——换句话说，那正是这座城市轻盈跃动之心的精髓所在。

In its earliest days, the fancy pants historians say that Rumplank was little more than a few rows of huts along a grassy slope overlooking Barnacle Bay's largest span of beachfront. A dirt path weaved from the huts, across the sandy grass, and to a pair of rickety docks, where it was rare to see more than half a dozen small boats moored at a time. The original Rumplankers had built a few dozen other buildings from lava rock—structures they called tarukis—around where the Misty River flowed into the bay, but other than these and their modest residential quarter, the region was mostly craggy black stone, weedy beaches, and wild jungle thickets.

Then, Poppy von Barnacle sailed into the bay and landed on the sandy shoreline, which she promptly named Treasure Beach. Almost in an instant, the Gilded Pirate and her impressive crew changed the face of the sleepy port town forever.

Much of what remains of Rumplank's pre-Poppy legacy can be found in what is now called Old Rumplank. Here, ancient g'mayun and orpok traditions have been relatively untouched by the cosmopolitan influences that alter attitudes and fashions almost weekly throughout the rest of the city. Strong local laws and a respect for the city's history prevent any new buildings from going up within Old Rumplank, though the spacious lawns and soft sands could surely accommodate many more. Stoneworkers practice the honored craft of taruki to repair existing lava stone structures, whereas wooden buildings are regularly maintained using fresh-cut palm trees and interwoven fronds. The buildings here consist primarily of private homes, small shrines, artisans' huts, and places where food is collected and shared, with the haphazard Drunken Wall in the east, a remnant of an attempt to build walls around the settlement. A micro-economy of gift giving makes trading something of a faux pas within Old Rumplank; it's much more acceptable here to barter goods and services than to make exchanges of coin or gold.

Whereas Barrel Square and the Claw Quarter exhibit the devil-may-care revelry for which modern Rumplank is well known, Old Rumplank offers a peek into a calmer, more subdued past, where emphasis is placed on being with family, helping the community, and taking things slowly—in other words, the quintessential buoyant heart.

Rosewater.name: 玫瑰露 Rosewater
Rosewater.text:
伦普兰克的首都区是其君主制的所在地，也是少数官僚的工作之处；这些官僚让伦普兰克的基础设施在城市其余部分纵情狂欢时仍能顺畅运转。这里以玫瑰水战斗命名，那是一场可怕却光荣的冲突，发生在伦普兰克文艺复兴的鼎盛时期；当时高大、无羽的入侵者驶入港湾，一心要征服并奴役热爱自由的伦普兰克人。波比·冯·藤壶领导了伦普兰克的防御，其主力主要是她自己的船员，外加少数几位坚韧的青年男女——那时这里仍只是个小村庄。尽管他们在人数与装备上都处于劣势，波比的战术才智仍让伦普兰克人赢得了胜利。

在这场血腥、持续一周的围攻结束后，波比明白，若没有至少一点城市规模的规划与军事训练，伦普兰克几乎不可能抵御未来一波又一波潜在的入侵者。她也知道自己不可能永远都在为伦普兰克人而战，而其中许多人对战争的艰辛全然陌生。为确保后世的安全，这位镀金海盗动用了她巨大的财富、她的法师同伴红袍阿拉霍斯科的才华，以及她船员的筋骨，建起了伦普兰克城堡、玫瑰水要塞，以及环绕这些力量中心的坚固石墙。这些建筑至今仍存，是伦普兰克政治权力与有限有组织防务的核心。尽管若没有相当可观的外部援助，这座城市肯定无法在海岸遭到全面进攻时坚持住，但自波比离去以来，伦普兰克驻军已成功击退了少数几次小规模冲突。所幸对伦普兰克而言，迄今尚无任何冲突可与臭名昭著的玫瑰水战斗相提并论。

Rumplank's capital district is the home of its monarchy and the few bureaucrats who keep Rumplank's infrastructure running smoothly while the rest of the city parties away. It's named for the Battle of Rosewater, a terrible but glorious conflict that occurred at the height of the Rumplank Renaissance, when tall, featherless invaders sailed into the harbor with every design to conquer and subjugate the freedom-loving Rumplankers. Poppy von Barnacle led the defense of Rumplank, which consisted primarily of her own crew along with a few hardy lads and lasses from what was then still just a small village. Though they were outnumbered and under-equipped, Poppy's tactical acumen saw the Rumplankers win the day.

In the wake of the bloody week-long siege, Poppy understood that Rumplank stood little chance against potential waves of future invaders without at least a modicum of city-scale planning and military training. She also knew she wouldn't be around forever to defend the Rumplankers, many of whom were totally unfamiliar with the travails of war. To ensure the safety of future generations, the Gilded Pirate exercised her vast wealth, the talent of her wizardly companion Arahosko the Red, and the muscles of her crew to construct Castle Rumplank, Rosewater Keep, and the sturdy stone walls surrounding these centers of power. These edifices remain to this day and are the heart of Rumplank's political powers and modest organized defenses. Though the city could surely not withstand an all-out assault on its shores without considerable outside aid, the Rumplank garrison has ably deflected the few minor conflicts that have occurred in the time since Poppy's departure. Thankfully for Rumplank, no clashes have yet compared to the infamous Battle of Rosewater.

Twin Talons.name: 双爪 Twin Talons
Twin Talons.text:
如果说喙爆丘邻里是朗普兰克最年轻、最鲁莽的孩子，那么双爪就是那个城区古怪的哥哥姐姐，决心开辟一条完全属于自己的道路。

在旧时代，朗普兰克人若一心只想同归于尽，便会在此一对一了结仇怨，通常会有家族成员与一位牧师在场。这些决斗场地至今仍一目了然，因为连杂草都无法在那被鲜血浸透的土壤里生长。

怪人和被排斥者向来会被双爪奇特的地理所吸引：构成同名地区的两座巨大、顶部平坦的尖峰。从海上的某些角度看去，那两根石柱宛如一对带钩的爪击。早期定居者将这怪异的地形视作不祥之兆，认为只有神祇与恶魔才胆敢居住于此。这种态度在朗普兰克文艺复兴期间发生了改变，当时洁希娅·迅箭从喙爆丘修建了第一座通往西爪的悬挂绳桥，证明这些地理异常并不比宝藏海滩更受诅咒。尽管如此，朗普兰克人仍又过了许多年才考虑在双爪上居住；而即便如此，这个新城区也主要吸引亡命之徒、革新者与隐士。

由于奇特的海洋风向模式，双爪的降水量比郁郁葱葱的朗普兰克本城少得多，因此这里的地面常常干燥、平坦而尘土飞扬。稳定的微气候使双爪成为炼金术士与工程师的理想之地，他们可以在临时实验室或野外测试最新点子。大部分双爪仍覆盖着稀疏斑驳的灌木平地；这些贫瘠的田地经常成为实验与公开展示的地点。走私违禁进口货物的商人，以及不喜欢爪区那种不间断、弱肉强食喧嚣的古怪罪犯，也会被这个人烟稀少的城区所吸引，好在相对平静的环境中进行非法交易。

自波比的时代以来，双爪之间又架设了更多悬挂桥。克拉格拉克工程师甚至沿着岩石边缘凿出几条石径，然而这些道路并不通往任何地方，而是径直在险峻之处戛然而止。在修建这些石径期间，建造者发现石柱的岩壁上布满了数百个浅浅的、拳头大小的洞孔。这些洞孔早于第一批金穗定居者，暗示某些古代生物曾将双爪用于他们自身的习俗；然而这些习俗的性质无人知晓，他们在挖掘洞孔时究竟如何附着在峭壁之侧也同样无从得知。攀登者在少数洞孔里发现了历史遗物——由石化木与宝石制成的护符，甚至还有几份保存在黑曜石瓶中的魔法调配物。然而，攀爬多风的峭壁十分危险，而数百个洞孔至今仍未被搜寻。

If the Beakbluster Hills neighborhood is Rumplank's youngest, brashest child, Twin Talons is that district's quirky older sibling, determined to carve a path all its own.

In old times, Rumplankers hellbent on mutual destruction settled their grudges here one on one, typically in the presence of family members and a priest. The dueling grounds are still easily discernible, since not even weeds can grow in the blood-soaked soil.

Eccentrics and outcasts have always been drawn to the peculiar geography of the Twin Talons: the two massive, flat-topped pinnacles that compose the district of the same name. From certain angles at sea, the pillars resemble a pair of hooked claws. Early settlers took the strange terrain as an ill omen, believing that only gods and demons were brazen enough to dwell there. This attitude changed during the Rumplank Renaissance, when Jesea Swiftarrow built the first hanging rope bridge from the Beakbluster Hills to the Western Talon, proving that the geographic anomalies were no more cursed than Treasure Beach. It still took many years before Rumplankers considered living on the Twin Talons, and even then, the new district appealed primarily to daredevils, innovators, and hermits.

The Talons see much less precipitation than lush Rumplank proper thanks to peculiar oceanic wind patterns, so the ground here is often dry, flat, and dusty. The stable micro-climate makes Twin Talons ideal for alchemists and engineers to test their latest ideas in makeshift labs or in the field. Flat plots of patchy scrub still cover most of the Twin Talons; these barren fields are frequently the sites of experiments and public demonstrations. Traders of illicit imports and quirky criminals who dislike the non-stop, bird-eat-bird bustle of the Claw Quarter also gravitate toward this sparsely populated district to conduct their illegal transactions in relative peace.

Additional hanging bridges have been stretched between the Twin Talons since Poppy's time. Kragrak engineers have even carved a few stone pathways along the edges of the rocks, though the paths don't lead anywhere, instead simply terminating precipitously. During the construction of these pathways, the builders discovered hundreds of shallow, fist-sized holes riddling the faces of the pillars. The holes pre-date the first Goldcrop settlers and suggest that some ancient creatures used the Twin Talons for their own customs, though the nature of these customs is anyone's guess, as is the means by which they clung to the cliff side while excavating the holes. Climbers have found historical artifacts in a few of the holes—fetishes made of petrified wood and gemstones, even a few magical concoctions preserved in obsidian flasks. Scaling the windy cliffs is dangerous, though, and hundreds of the holes remain as-yet unsearched.

Natural Landmarks.name: 自然地标 Natural Landmarks
Natural Landmarks.text:
荒凉的峭壁、金色的沙滩、热带丛林，以及丰饶的珊瑚礁石，吸引了第一批g'mayun定居者来到如今的Rumplank。尽管这座城市拥有财富、建筑巧思与多彩文化，但与环绕其周围的美丽自然特性相比，它本身仍相形见绌。

Austere cliffs, golden sands, tropical jungles, and rich coral reefs drew the first g'mayun settlers to what is now Rumplank. For all its wealth, architectural ingenuity, and colorful culture, the city itself still pales in comparison to the beautiful natural features that surround it.

Barnacle Bay.name: 藤壶湾 Barnacle Bay
Barnacle Bay.text:
这座天然港湾与伦普兰克的庇护创始人同名纯属巧合，不过也有人认为，这恰恰证明了波比·冯·藤壶注定要在这片地区留下自己的印记。这些事儿就是这么巧，不是吗？尽管人们可能会以为名为“藤壶湾”的一片水域会是遍布甲壳类附着巨石的险恶沼泽，但那片朦胧的蓝色水域却恰恰相反。事实上，最初的金穗岛屿探险者发现，这座海湾的水面平静宜人，盛产色彩斑斓的珊瑚、肥美的鱼类以及带着腐殖质的沙土。和这座奇妙岛屿的许多其他地方一样，他们给这处海湾取了个相对不讨喜的名字，试图劝退其他海员前来他们的私人天堂。而我们都知道结果如何！

That this natural harbor bears the same name as Rumplank's patron founder is pure coincidence, though some believe that it's just proof that Poppy von Barnacle was destined to leave her mark on this region. It's funny how these things work out, no? Though one might expect a body of water called Barnacle Bay to be a treacherous morass of crustacean-covered boulders, the hazy blue waters are anything but. In truth, the original explorers of Goldcrop Island found the waters of this bay calm, delightful, and rich with colorful coral, meaty fish, and loamy sand. Like many other parts of the wondrous island, they gave the inlet its relatively unpleasant name in an attempt to dissuade other seafarers from making the trip to their private paradise. And we all know how that turned out!

Beaches.name: 海滩 Beaches
Beaches.text:
无数海滩点缀着金作物岛屿的周边，而朗普兰克拥有其中一些最好的海滩。最受欢迎的包括：桶广场外的戈诺尼海滩、醉墙东侧的狂风海滩，以及老朗普兰克那片辽阔如天堂般的海滨——宝藏海滩。远不如这些受欢迎的是爪击区的小铁盐湾，多年来不止一具尸体被海水冲上岸。至于捕鱼与采集，黑壳海岸才是该去的地方——因其岩石海岸线上密密聚集的蛤蜊、贻贝与扇贝所带来的丰饶而得名。

Countless beaches dot the perimeter of Goldcrop Island, and Rumplank boasts some of its finest. Among the most popular are Gononi's Beach off Barrel Square, Gusty Beach on the east side of the Drunken Wall, and Old Rumplank's vast paradisiacal waterfront, Treasure Beach. Far less popular is little Ironsalt Cove in the Claw Quarter, where more than one body has washed up over the years. As for fishing and foraging, Blackshell Coast is the place to go, so named for the bounty of clams, mussels, and scallops clumped along the rocky shoreline.

Canary Cliffs.name: 金丝雀峭壁 Canary Cliffs
Canary Cliffs.text:
伦普兰克东南边缘的峭壁也许不像双爪那样拥有繁盛的城市生活，但在难得的天气晴朗之日，它们同样壮丽无比。每逢此时，它们便为徒步者呈现巴纳克湾、环绕其畔的城市、向东延伸的岛屿南部海岸线，有时甚至还能一览颤栗山的全貌。

金丝雀峭壁延续了伦普兰克地标“名不副实”的传统，因为在这些高耸绝壁之巅根本看不到任何小巧绚丽的鸟儿。事实上，一年有一半时间，这些峭壁荒凉至极，除了一些迷途甲虫与偶尔目光锐利的鹰之外，几乎没有多少生命。然而自雨季开始，金丝雀峭壁便会因成千上万怪异、怪物般的妖精而变得活动异常频繁；它们栖身于峭壁无数岩石突出处，筑巢并产卵。

这些来访的妖精被称为“鞭鱼”，外形仿佛寻常飞鱼与蜜旋木雀的混合体，但其聪明程度却明显不如两者，常常彼此相撞，或像蚊子在裸露的奥波克手臂或硬里根脖颈周围笨拙盘旋般，一头撞上峭壁。人们相信它们来自妖精界，并且有时会一路把古怪的石头、闪亮的小饰品或奇异的护符带到金作物镇。鞭鱼为何每年都要朝圣般来到金丝雀峭壁仍是未知；它们从不公然攻击伦普兰克或其居民，但在“鞭鱼月份”里，若有行人愚蠢地闯入其领地，它们就会成为脾气暴躁的主人。尽管如此，若有冒险者能悄然穿过这些凶躁的群落，或许就能在峭壁边的巢穴间找到藏着的珍贵之物。与其等到妖精的卵孵化、群落带着细小的幼群飞越海洋而去，往往不如冒着被愤怒的鞭鱼啄上几口的风险；选择后者的人通常会发现自己不得不与数十名业余宝藏猎人争夺所剩无几的东西。金丝雀峭壁曾发生过“意外”，据说那是竞争的逐财者对峙升温所致。

The cliffs along the southeastern edge of Rumplank may not host as much city life as the Twin Talons, but they are no less spectacular on the rare days when the weather is clear. On such occasions, they offer hikers dazzling views of Barnacle Bay, the city around it, the island's southern coastline to the east, and sometimes even the entirety of Shivering Mountain.

The Canary Cliffs adhere to the custom of Rumplank landmarks with misleading names, for there are no small, colorful birds to be seen from the top of these soaring heights. In fact, for half the year, the cliffs are utterly barren, possessing no more life than some errant beetles and the occasional keen-eyed hawk. Starting in the rainy season, though, the Canary Cliffs become a hotbed of strange activity when thousands of strange, monstrous fey perch along the cliffs' countless rocky outcroppings to make their nests and lay their eggs.

These visiting fey, called whipperfish, resemble a cross between a common flying fish and a honeycreeper but are markedly less intelligent than either, constantly bumping into one another or the cliff sides like mosquitoes bumbling around for a bared orpok arm or hardriggan neck. They're believed to hail from the fey realm, from which they sometimes bring peculiar stones, gleaming trinkets, or strange talismans all the way with them to Goldcrop. It's unknown why whipperfish make a yearly pilgrimage to the Canary Cliffs; they never outright attack Rumplank or its people, though they make for surly hosts anytime a pedestrian foolishly enters their territory during "whipperfish months." Adventurers who can sneak through the ornery flocks, though, might hope to find something precious hidden among their cliff-side nests. It's often better to risk a few pecks from angry whipperfish than to wait until the fey's eggs hatch and the colonies fly off across the ocean, tiny brood in tow; those who choose the latter often find themselves competing with dozens of other amateur treasure hunters for whatever's left. "Accidents" have been known to occur along the Canary Cliffs when confrontations between rival fortune seekers become heated.

Jungle Outlands.name: 丛林外域 Jungle Outlands
Jungle Outlands.text:
金穗岛屿遍布着数不清的丛林，其中大多数甚至没有名字，伦普兰克以东的林地也是如此。大多数伦普兰克人只是把这片区域称作“丛林外域”，有时也叫“伦普兰克丛林”。采集者经常在浓密的植被中搜寻野生果树、幼嫩的鲁巴洛嫩芽，以及本地粉色日灌木的营养叶片。葱郁丛林里充沛的景象、声响与气味每天都将无数伦普兰克人吸引进它温暖的怀抱，但这片荒野的广袤程度也远远足以容纳城里众多亲林者。

丛林绵延数英里，我们这些土生土长的伦普兰克人大多知道该在迷路前何时折返。到了夜里，丛林便活跃起来：硬壳的波波多猴在灌木丛间飞窜；利爪尖锐的嚎叫龟从树冠俯视；侏儒提亚洛顿攀附在满是昆虫的树干侧面。老练的海盗与咯咯笑的孩子都会讲些令人毛骨悚然的故事，说有个名为“食者舒吉亚尔”的怪物——神话中的“G'mayun吞噬者”——据称会在丛林外域中潜行，并住在一座由受害者骸骨制成的巨人笼子里。不过事实往往比虚构更离奇，所以如果我是你，我会把这些篝火传说当回事。

Goldcrop Island is packed with so many jungles that most don't have names, and this is true for the woodland east of Rumplank as well. Most Rumplankers refer to this region simply as the "jungle outlands" or sometimes the "Rumplank jungle." Foragers frequently peruse the dense foliage for wild fruit trees, young rubalo shoots, and nutritious leaves from the native pink sun-bush. The ample sights, sounds, and smells of the lush jungle draw countless Rumplankers into its warm embrace every day, but the wilds are more than big enough to accommodate the city's numerous nemophilists.

The jungle stretches on for many miles, and most of us native Rumplankers know when to turn back before getting lost. At night, the jungle comes alive with hard-shelled popodo monkeys that dart through the underbrush, sharp-clawed howler turtles that stare down from the canopy, and pygmy thyalodons that cling to the sides of insect-filled tree trunks. Hardened pirates and giggling children alike tell spooky stories of Shugiyar the G'mayun Eater, a mythical monster that reputedly stalks the jungle outlands and lives in a giant cage made of its victims' bones. But fact is stranger than fiction, so if I were you, I'd give credence to these campfire tales.

Misty River.name: 迷雾河 Misty River
Misty River.text:
这条宽阔的河流源自颤寒山融化的积雪，其之于朗普兰克人的生活，几乎就如同它所汇入的海洋一样不可或缺。它在抵达藤壶湾之前，于花之岛分成两条短支流，而每一条都被称为迷雾河。渔民可以沿着迷雾河宽阔的河岸任意择地停驻，用抛网或垂钓捕获各式各样的洄游鱼类。此河之名源于清晨时分总会稳稳笼罩水面的那层薄雾，但在这些神圣的时辰里，迷雾河并不属于朗普兰克人，而属于动物与怪物。淡水海鞘、领地意识强烈的掠夺河狸、口渴的鹦鹉熊，以及其他掠食者，都会借助遮蔽视线的雾气悄然接近毫无防备的猎物。即便只是于此时从河中采集水，也是一项惊心动魄的尝试；已有不止少数的朗普兰克人，在胆敢踏入河雾之后便就此失踪。

The broad river that originates from Shivering Mountain's melting snowpack is nearly as much a fixture of Rumplank life as the ocean into which it flows. It splits into two short branches at the Isle of Flowers before reaching Barnacle Bay, each of which is called Misty River. Fishers can perch along any of the Misty River's ample banks to net or line-catch a variety of anadromous fare. The river is named for the layer of fog that reliably blankets the water in the early morning, but during these hallowed hours the Misty River belongs not to Rumplankers but to animals and monsters. Freshwater sea squirts, territorial reaver beavers, thirsty parrotbears, and other predators use the obfuscating fog to sneak up on unsuspecting prey. Even simply gathering water from the river during such times is a harrowing endeavor, and more than a few Rumplankers have gone missing after daring to venture into the river mist.

Okorki Hills.name: 奥科尔基丘陵 Okorki Hills
Okorki Hills.text:
鲁姆普兰克山坡腹地那些边缘锋利的熔岩岩石让这些丘陵得名；其名是一种拟声词，模仿大多数奥波克在一块乱石刮伤它们柔嫩脚踝时发出的声音。格梅尤恩的爪足远不那么敏感，因此更容易穿越奥科尔基丘陵，不过大多数仍懒得跋涉，因为这些不起眼的荒地实际上是距离鲁姆普兰克本城咫尺之内最危险的地区之一。

模糊不清的陷坑点缀着奥科尔基丘陵干旱的地表，向下通入满是尘土的洞窟与各种彼此相连的动物地洞。这些洞穴中最危险的住民无疑是盐潜猎者，它们之中没多少会乐意类人生物闯进自己的繁殖地。

奥科尔基丘陵也栖息着其他有趣的金作物植物与动物，包括阿夫涅斯与象形蝎（两者都暗示着尚未被发现的坟墓存在），以及一种为岩石地形特别适应、薄如刀刃且迅捷如闪电的血色玫瑰。然而，即便在我那些同为鲁姆普兰克人的同伴之中，也几乎没人有胆量亲自探索这片充满怪物的地区；大多数研究者、草药师与屠夫都满足于付钱请强悍的冒险者代他们在奥科尔基一带游荡。

The sharp-edged lava rocks of Rumplank's mountainside hinterlands give these hills their name, which is an onomatopoeia for the sound most orpoks make when an errant stone gouges their tender ankles. G'mayuns, whose taloned feet are far less sensitive, have an easier time traversing the Okorki Hills, though most still don't bother making the trek, since these unassuming badlands are in fact one of the most dangerous regions within a stone's throw of Rumplank proper.

Indistinct sinkholes pock the arid surface of the Okorki Hills, descending into dusty grottos and various interconnected animal burrows. The most dangerous inhabitants of these holes are certainly salt stalkers, not very many of whom appreciate humanoids stumbling into their breeding grounds.

The Okorki Hills are home to other interesting Goldcrop flora and fauna as well, including afneiths and hieroglyph scorpions (each of which hints at the presence of as-of-yet undiscovered tombs) and a razor-thin, lightning-quick species of sanguine rose specially adapted to the rocky terrain. However, even among my fellow Rumplankers, few are brave enough to explore the monster-filled region for ourselves; most researchers, herbalists, and butchers are content to pay hardy adventurers to roam the Okorkis in their stead.

Locations.name: 地点 Locations
Locations.text:
以下是鲁姆普兰克境内一些最著名、最引人注目且最富传奇色彩的地点。

The following are some of the most famous, notable, and storied locales in Rumplank.

1. Warbling Ravine.name: 1. 啭鸣峡谷 1. Warbling Ravine
1. Warbling Ravine.text:
伦普兰克抵御内陆入侵者的主要防线，是城市西北象限的一处天然洼地，名为“啭鸣峡谷”。在暴雨来临前、暴雨期间或暴雨过后，反常的雨水洪流会沿着这条沟壑奔涌而下，猛撞巨石、植被以及途中的一切，随后汇入迷雾河。这种山洪极难预测，以至于大多数人只敢在完全晴朗的天气里探索啭鸣峡谷。有些人认为峡谷固有的危险值得冒险；以往的远征曾带回有价值的怪物尸体，甚至还有数量可观的天然金矿石。

Rumplank's main line of defense from inland invaders is a natural depression in the city's northwestern quadrant called the Warbling Ravine. Before, during, or after rainstorms, freak torrents of rainwater rush down the gulch, slamming through boulders, foliage, and anything else in their way before draining into the Misty River. Such flash floods are so difficult to predict that most people only dare explore the Warbling Ravine during perfectly clear weather. Some consider the ravine's inherent dangers a risk worth taking; past expeditions have yielded valuable monster carcasses and even sizable quantities of raw gold ore.

2. Blazing Meadow.name: 2. 炽焰草甸 2. Blazing Meadow
2. Blazing Meadow.text:
这些令人惊叹的花田最为人所知的是它们作为伦普兰克每年春季“罂粟之夜”节庆的举办地，但即便在节庆季早已结束后，“炽焰草甸”的女性 g'mayun 看护者，希希卡娅·蜜酒匠，仍全年辛勤劳作，以维持她那庞大（且利润极其可观）的农场。除了罂粟之外，希希卡娅还种植了成片的鸡蛋花、木槿、薰衣草、兰花、姜花与甘薯花，以及靛蓝群岛本地的花卉，例如落日玫瑰、风蓟、提阿波尼娅与冠歌花。尽管花卉品种繁多，希希卡娅几乎不靠卖花赚到任何钱；相反，她的财富来自于规模庞大的蜜酒酿造事业——这是一门传承超过五代的家族生意。

今年，灾难正悄然逼近炽焰草甸的蜜酒产业——希希卡娅的所有蜂箱都空了！随着她的蜜酒存货不断减少，希希卡娅愈发担心自己无法赶在“罂粟之夜”之前酿出足够多的招牌饮品。她正支付给冒险者丰厚的报酬，让他们从丛林边境地带的巨人蜂巢中取回蜂蜜，尤其是新近采收的 eeko 蜂蜜还会有特别的加值。亲爱的读者，你会是那个来帮她的人吗？

These impressive flower fields are best known as the site of Rumplank's annual springtime Poppy Nights festival, but even long after festival season is over, Blazing Meadow's female g'mayun caretaker, Shishikaya Meadsmith, works hard year-round to maintain her enormous (and enormously profitable) farm. In addition to poppies, Shishikaya grows acres of plumeria, hibiscus, lavender, orchid, ginger, and sweet potato flowers, as well as native Indigo Isles flowers like sunset rose, wind thistle, tiaponia, and crownsong. For all this floral variety, Shishikaya hardly makes any money at all from selling flowers; rather, she derives her fortunes from her expansive mead operation, a family business passed down for over five generations.

This year, catastrophe looms just over the horizon for Blazing Meadow mead—all of Shishikaya's beehives are empty! As her back stock of mead dwindles, Shishikaya is becoming ever more worried that she won't be able to brew enough of her famous beverage in time for Poppy Nights. She's paying adventurers impressive fees to retrieve honey from the giant beehives in the jungle outlands, with a special bonus for freshly harvested eeko honey in particular. Could you be the one to help her out, dear reader?

3. Crawling Caves.name: 3. 匍匐洞窟 3. Crawling Caves
3. Crawling Caves.text:
靠近城市、怪物横行，并且据说埋藏着数不清的海盗宝藏，爬行洞窟堪称新手冒险者的梦境。名副其实，这些洞窟像一条巨型蠕虫的隧道般自我盘绕，时而转向、时而扭曲、时而交织，形成一座天然迷宫，连洞窟自身的居民也会被弄得晕头转向。数代以来，王室红羽家族一直悬赏一千金币，奖励任何能成功绘制整座洞窟完整地图的人，但至今无人能完成这项壮举。

多年来，这些洞窟一直是伦普兰克诸多最惨痛悲剧的舞台。死灵法师夸洛提·瓦斯卡林在与其高塔地城相连的洞窟中进行了无数次实验，他的一些怪物造物至今仍在地下深处徘徊。海罂粟·冯·藤壶那位虔诚的冒险同伴皮诺梅里·埃勒马特当年为伦普兰克肃清了无数亡灵，但人们相信他在爬行洞窟某处棋逢对手——因为最后一次有人见到那位靛蓝巨龙牧师时，他正站在靠近奥卡里丘陵的洞窟入口。许多洞穴探勘者为了寻找埃勒马特的传奇钉头锤“加斯特林”而勇闯洞窟，但无人带回哪怕一丝关于他下落的线索。相反，洞窟磨难的幸存者讲述着巨人般的骷髅丝尾甲虫、幽灵海盗，以及一种无形的恐惧或杀意的感官——无论你在洞窟中走到哪里，它都会如影随形。

Close to the city, rife with monsters, and reputedly full of untold hoards of buried pirate treasure, the Crawling Caves are a rookie adventurer's dream. True to their name, the caves turn, twist, and weave around themselves like the tunnel of a massive worm, resulting in a natural labyrinth that befuddles even its own inhabitants. For generations the royal Redfeathers have offered a standing reward of a thousand gold pieces to anyone who can successfully map the caves in their entirety, but so far no one's been up to the task.

The caves have been the backdrop for many of Rumplank's worst tragedies over the years. The necromancer Quoloti Vaskarin conducted countless experiments in the caves connected to his tower's dungeons, and some of his monstrous creations continue to haunt the subterranean depths. Poppy von Barnacle's pious adventuring companion Pinomeri Elemarte cleansed Rumplank of countless undead in his day, but he's believed to have met his match somewhere in the Crawling Caves, since the last time anyone saw the indigo dragon cleric was at the caves' entrance near the Okari Hills. Many spelunkers have braved the caves in search of Elemarte's legendary mace, Ghastlimn, but none have returned with even a clue of his whereabouts. Instead, survivors of the caves' travails tell stories of giant skeletal silk-tailed beetles, ghostly pirates, and an impalpable sense of dread or killing intent that follows one wherever they go in the caves.

4. Nevergo's Antidotes.name: 4. 尼弗戈的解毒剂 4. Nevergo's Antidotes
4. Nevergo's Antidotes.text:
“内弗戈船长”，内弗戈解毒剂店那位可疑的g’mayun店主，根本算不上什么熟练的炼金术师。只要有眼睛的人都能看出，这家阴暗破旧的铺子换在任何别的聚居地，早就关门大吉了。许多人没有意识到的是，内弗戈的临街门面几乎算不上商店，更多只是个幌子。这位嘶嘶作声的药剂师大多数交易都在夜色掩蔽下进行；他与外来与本地的罪犯做买卖，贩卖各种器具与玩意儿，比如淬毒匕首、催眠气体、以及有毒滴耳液。拉姆普兰克几乎每个不法之徒都知道：如果你想低调地买点炼金物品，内弗戈那儿就是该去的地方。

拉姆普兰克大多数守法居民都会去别处购买药水与药膏，不过在紧急关头，或许还能在内弗戈解毒剂店某个积满灰尘的角落里，找到一瓶落下的治疗药水。遇到真正的顾客时，内弗戈似乎会忘了自己在交易中应扮演的规则；多数时候他会直接把潜在买家赶走，催他们想拿什么就拿了快滚，要不就坐一会儿，听他讲一段他那以夸张闻名的“往昔航行”传奇虚构故事。有人提出付款时，这位“船长”轻则一头雾水，重则勃然大怒。大多数人对内弗戈的古怪只是一笑置之，认为也许是他不断啜饮的黄色利口酒带来的副作用，或是他过去某次炼金事故的后遗症。事实上，内弗戈只是个技艺高超且始终如一的骗子，以至于连他自己都忘了真相止于何处、寓言始于何方。

围绕内弗戈船长有着诸多谜团，其中最主要的，是一个对事实把握如此飘忽的人，究竟如何经营起一门成功的犯罪生意。内弗戈常常把谎言说得极其逼真，令听众不禁怀疑：也许错的反而是他们，也许船长那些不可能的夸张故事其实都是真的。无论如何，最了解他的人都知道：对几乎所有人来说，内弗戈都是个谜——尤其，或许对他自己也是。

"Captain Nevergo," the dubious g'mayun proprietor of Nevergo's Antidotes, is anything but a skilled alchemist. Anyone with eyes can see that this dingy establishment would have been shuttered long ago in any other settlement. What many fail to realize is that Nevergo's storefront is hardly a store and mostly just a front. The hissing apothecary makes most of his deals under the cover of night, when he trades with criminals both foreign and local in a variety of paraphernalia such as poisoned daggers, sleeping gas, and toxic eardrops. Just about every ne'er-do-well in Rumplank knows that if you want to buy something alchemical discreetly, Nevergo's is the place to go.

Most law-abiding Rumplankers find their potions and salves elsewhere, though in a pinch, one might be able to find an errant healing potion tucked in a dusty corner of Nevergo's Antidotes. When met with a legitimate customer, Nevergo seems to forget the rules of his role in the exchange; more often than not he'll simply shoo would-be buyers away, urging them to take whatever they want and begone, or else to sit a while and listen to one of his legendarily grandiose fictions of previous voyages. When offered payment, the "captain" is confused at best, irate at worst. Most people shrug off Nevergo's eccentricities as perhaps a side effect of the yellow liqueur he's constantly sipping, or perhaps some alchemical accident in his past. In truth, Nevergo is simply so skilled and so consistent a liar that he himself has forgotten where the truth ends and the fables begin.

Many mysteries surround Captain Nevergo, chief among them how someone with such a tenuous grip on facts can run a successful criminal business. Nevergo often speaks of his lies so convincingly that it leaves listeners wondering if it is perhaps they who have it all wrong, that perhaps the captain's impossible tall tales are true after all. Regardless, those who know him best know that Nevergo is an enigma to just about everyone—especially, perhaps, himself.

5. The Gutted Snake.name: 5. 被开膛的蛇 5. The Gutted Snake
5. The Gutted Snake.text:
在鲁姆普兰克，镇上“最佳酒吧”的头衔竞争激烈，各处拥趸的强烈意见甚至会引发街头斗殴。另一方面，几乎所有鲁姆普兰克人都一致认为镇上最糟的酒吧是“剖腹蛇”。酒保莫洛“致病”多戈多尔，以及那群臭名昭著的海盗帮派“铁鳗”，也许是“剖腹蛇”里最广为人知的常客，但在那些在洒满劣酒污渍的角落里出没的无赖之中，他们远非唯一的一批。酒吧里常能见到一位沉默的维吉斯·乔科里保镖，名叫切玛；他不知怎么做到的，只靠一壶又一壶地灌下多戈多尔那咸腥的劣酒，竟还能让自己的珊瑚保持活性。被称作蛇舞者贝尔帕的雌性格玛云舞者每个周末都会登台表演；尽管她怀揣着在鲁姆普兰克酒馆巡演的宏大梦境，但只有“剖腹蛇”的酒客才能勉强忍受她那令人毛骨悚然的歌舞——而她演出时还会配上一条眼睛深蓝的真正活蛇。仿佛她那令人作呕的表演还不够瘆人似的，一些酒客开始散布谣言：其实是那条蛇在用魔法强迫贝尔帕跳舞，而非相反。

“红腹三人组”是来自雅卡波镇的三名被流放罪犯，他们每周至少两次来到“剖腹蛇”，举办小型的加尔察戈里纸牌比赛。尽管三人占尽优势——毕竟他们从小在加尔察戈里聚居地长大——他们仍总能找到些冤大头拉来痛宰，在酒吧破碎的临街窗户旁那张表上狠狠干上一笔。他们最爱的游戏自然是“雅卡波小丑”，不过他们也乐意玩些更受欢迎的游戏，比如“鸟笼”、“罂粟的奖赏”，以及“命运或翻覆”。霍科和克利皮总是公平地玩牌，这是他们引以为傲的一点；不过这些加尔察戈里女性仍能凭借自己的技能与对牌局门道的了解赚得盆满钵满。他们的第三人伊普西马特斯牌技不如另外两位，但在形势不利时他也不介意作弊——他会把牌堆换成自己的活占卜牌组，那是一套名为K'maniqa的古老牌组。

There's a lot of competition in Rumplank for the best bar in town, with fierce opinions leading to street brawls among the proponents of various locations. On the other hand, nearly all Rumplankers agree that the worst bar in town is the Gutted Snake. The barkeep, Molo "Make-Sick" Dogodor, and the nefarious gang of pirates, the Iron Eels, may be the Gutted Snake's best-known regulars, but they're far from the only ne'er-do-wells who haunt its grog-stained corners. A silent vergiss chochori bodyguard named Chema can frequently be found at the bar, somehow keeping their coral alive by downing pitcher after pitcher of Dogodor's briny swill. The female g'mayun dancer known as Belpa the Snake Swinger performs every weekend; though she has big dreams of playing the Rumplank tavern circuit, only the patrons of the Gutted Snake can stomach her haunting song and dance, which she performs with a real live serpent with dark blue eyes. As if her gut-wrenching performance weren't disturbing enough, some patrons have started rumors that it is in fact the snake who magically compels Belpa to dance, not the other way around.

The Red-Bellied Three, a trio of exiled criminals from Jakapo Town, come to the Snake at least twice a week to host small tournaments of galtzagorri card games. Even though the Three have a clear advantage since they grew up in a galtzagorri enclave, they still manage to find rubes to drag in and trounce at their table near the bar's broken front window. Their favorite game is, naturally, Jakapo Jokers, though they're also happy to play more popular games such as Birdcage, Poppy's Prize, and Fortune or Scuttle. Hoko and Klippi always play fairly, a point they pride themselves on, though the galtzagorri women still rake in quite the profit thanks to their skill and knowledge of the games' ins and outs. Their third, Ipsimartes, is not quite as talented at cards as the other two, but he also isn't above cheating when the chips are down, which he does by switching the deck for his living divination deck, an ancient set of cards named K'maniqa.

6. Castle Rumplank.name: 6. 伦普兰克城堡 6. Castle Rumplank
6. Castle Rumplank.text:
这座城市现任的君主——王室“红羽”家族——居住在朗普兰克城堡（Castle Rumplank）中。这是一座气势迫人的本地熔岩石建筑，外覆猩红的旗帜、三角旗与飘带，其上绘有王室红羽徽记与朗普兰克的旗帜。据历史记录记载，波比·冯·藤壶（Poppy von Barnacle）那位侠义的法师同伴“红色的阿拉霍斯科”（Arahosko the Red）在两百多年前、朗普兰克文艺复兴时期监督了城堡的建造。建造者拆解了神圣的塔鲁基（taruki），并用其熔岩石修建朗普兰克城堡，使其既象征朗普兰克受尊崇的过去，也象征其充满希望的未来；他们选择在藤壶湾（Barnacle Bay）北端、具有战略位置的花之岛（Isle of Flowers）作为地基的建造地点。城堡领地的其余部分，包括城墙、主堡与其他建筑，则使用从奥科尔基丘陵（Okorki Hills）运来的熔岩岩石建成，而非取用现存的塔鲁基。

城堡的城墙圈起的范围包含朗普兰克城堡本体、同样宏伟的玫瑰水要塞（Rosewater Keep）、城堡的驻军营房、一片精心修整的礼仪草坪，以及几栋小型行政建筑。一般的朗普兰克居民通常不会在城堡领地内闲逛，除非是在诸如马克塞尔女王（Queen Maxelle）生日之类的王室节庆之时。在这些场合，德鲁伊王廷会运来盆栽棕榈树、驯化的丛林动物与一车车水果，而朗普兰克最古老的海盗与贵族家族则会陈列金达布隆与精美艺术品的展览。红羽家族不会要求朗普兰克居民进行效忠展示或征收不公的税赋，因此城堡很少成为纷争之地。尽管如此，它紧邻灾厄的爪击区（Claw Quarter），偶尔也会招来破坏者或飞贼。出于这个原因，一小队卫兵昼夜巡逻城堡领地，但被严格命令不得伤害任何因非法擅闯而被逮捕的人。

The city's current monarchs, the royal Redfeathers, live in Castle Rumplank, an imposing edifice of native lava stone blanketed in crimson banners, pennons, and streamers bearing the royal Redfeather crest and the flag of Rumplank. According to the historical records, Poppy von Barnacle's chivalrous wizard companion, Arahosko the Red, oversaw the castle's construction over 200 years ago during the Rumplank Renaissance. Builders dismantled sacred tarukis and used the lava stones to construct Castle Rumplank so that it would represent both Rumplank's honored past as well as its promising future, and they chose the strategically located Isle of Flowers at the northern end of Barnacle Bay to build its foundation. The rest of the castle grounds, including the walls, keep, and other buildings, were made from lava rock hauled from the Okorki Hills, rather than existing taruki.

The castle's walls encompass Castle Rumplank itself, the equally imposing Rosewater Keep, the castle's garrison, a meticulously manicured ceremonial lawn, and a few small administrative buildings. Common Rumplankers generally don't loiter about the castle grounds except during royal holidays such as Queen Maxelle's birthday. On such occasions, the royal court of druids brings in potted palm trees, tamed jungle animals, and wagonloads of fruit, and Rumplank's oldest families of pirates and patricians showcase exhibits of gold doubloons and fine art. The Redfeathers don't demand displays of fealty or unfair taxes from Rumplankers, so the castle is rarely a site of strife. That said, its proximity to the calamitous Claw Quarter does draw the occasional vandal or cat burglar. For this reason, a small contingent of guards patrol the castle grounds day and night, though with strict orders to not harm anyone apprehended for unlawful trespassing.

7. Revelry Bridge.name: 7. 狂欢桥 7. Revelry Bridge
7. Revelry Bridge.text:
名为狂欢桥的过河通道，其实只是这座桥梁最新的一次化身；在朗普兰克的诸多节庆中，它曾一次又一次被砸得粉碎，或因超载而坍塌。自桶子广场出发的行进乐队、游行队伍与流动庆典会沿着城中不同路线行进，但多数都会在庆典最高潮时汇聚到狂欢桥。天然的瓶颈效应会造成一股拥挤不堪的醉酒狂欢人潮。然而，更增添这份危险的是一则关于浸透桥板的不洁作祟的传奇。根据幽灵（特征）故事，这作祟由所有曾在狂欢桥此前各次版本中丧生之人的灵体所组成，并渴望更多人遭遇同样注定的结局。传说，为了平息对更多受害者的渴求，这些灵体会在路人接近桥梁时附身其上，在受害者体内灌入一种超自然的干渴。多数日子里，人们会从迷雾河啜饮一口水来缓解突如其来的口干舌燥。然而，在诸如内瓦拉这般喧闹的节日里，手边唯一的液态只剩下一品脱朗姆酒或一壶麦酒时，受影响者便会毫无节制地豪饮这些醉人之物。到这一步，只需一个不经意的手肘碰撞或一杯洒落的酒，就足以让这支酩酊的队伍演变成全面斗殴，而其后果往往致命。

The river crossing called Revelry Bridge is actually only the latest incarnation of a span that's repeatedly smashed to bits or overloaded and collapsed during Rumplank's many festivals. Marching bands, parades, and moving festivals starting in Barrel Square follow various routes through the city, but most end up at Revelry Bridge at the height of the celebration. The natural bottleneck results in a crushing crowd of drunken merrymakers. Compounding this danger, though, is the legend of an unholy haunt that suffuses the planks. According to ghost stories, the haunt is composed of the spirits of everyone who's ever perished on previous iterations of Revelry Bridge, and it pines for others to meet the same doomed fate. As the stories go, to shake their thirst for ever more victims, the spirits possess passersby as they near the bridge, instilling in their victims a supernatural thirst. Most days, folks resolve their sudden parched tongue with a nip of water from the Misty River. During raucous holidays like Nevala, though, when the only liquid on hand is a pint of rum or a jug of ale, the afflicted guzzle their intoxicants with abandon. At this point, it only takes one stray elbow or spilled drink to cause the hammered procession to break into an all-out melee, often with deadly consequences.

8. Egger's Ends & Oddities.name: 8. 埃格的末端与奇珍异物 8. Egger's Ends & Oddities
8. Egger's Ends & Oddities.text:
拉姆普兰克的非官方冒险者补给商店是位于甲壳场附近的艾格的终点与奇珍。称这家店很大都不足以形容它；克拉明科·艾格，这位非二元性别的 g'mayun 店主，有远见地把他们的商业大卖场设在一座透风、破败的仓库里——那仓库是他们低价买下的。多年下来，仓库逐渐被各种工具与补给填满：从沉船里打捞来的物品、由退休冒险者出售的武器，以及不少整箱明目张胆偷来的赃物。

艾格既乐于从顾客手里收购道具，也同样乐于把道具卖出去；不过，真正能赚到的钱，来自艾格定期张贴的悬赏。每周一开始，艾格就会把新的通缉清单——需要的装备与紧缺的材料——钉在店门外的告示板上。任何人只要能在周末前把所需材料带回来，就会因其劳动而获得丰厚报酬，并在这位大商人那些更不寻常的货物上得到相当可观的折扣。

Rumplank's unofficial adventurers' supply store is Egger's Ends & Oddities near the Crustyard. To call the shop large wouldn't do it justice; Klaminko Egger, the nonbinary g'mayun shopkeeper, had the foresight to establish their commercial emporium in a drafty, dilapidated warehouse bought on the cheap. Over the years, the warehouse has gradually filled with tools and supplies scavenged from sunken ships, weapons sold by retiring adventurers, and more than a few crates of outright stolen booty.

Egger is as happy to purchase gear from customers as they are to sell it; the real money to be had, however, comes from Egger's regularly posted bounties. At the beginning of every week, Egger sticks new lists of wanted equipment and sought-after materials on the job board outside the store's entrance. Anyone who can bring them back the requested material before the end of the week is paid handsomely for their labor and given a hefty discount on some of the mogul's more unusual wares.

9. Crustyard.name: 9. 甲壳庭院 9. Crustyard
9. Crustyard.text:
蟹壳船坞是伦普兰克航运业务的工业枢纽。在这里，造船匠建造并修理帆船，码头工人装卸商船，船长们在码头边的酒吧里游荡，寻找值得招募加入他们最新远征的水手或海盗。岸边一排排的仓库里存放着既珍贵又普通的货物；这些货物要么正等待装船运往靛蓝群岛各地，要么是进口货物，正准备通过陆路运输送达其在伦普兰克的预定收货人。

The Crustyard is the industrial hub of Rumplank's shipping operations. Here, shipwrights build and repair sailing vessels, dockhands load or unload merchant ships, and captains prowl dockside bars in search of worthy sailors or pirates to join their latest expedition. Warehouses lining the shore contain wares both valuable and mundane; these goods are either waiting to be loaded onto a vessel for shipment throughout the Indigo Isles, or are imports being prepared for ground transportation to their intended recipient in Rumplank.

10. Temple Of Many Colors.name: 10. 多彩神殿 10. Temple Of Many Colors
10. Temple Of Many Colors.text:
万色神殿欢迎所有人前来崇拜平衡——当然，恶魔崇拜者除外。这座神殿的g'mayun大祭司虹彩科尔维，是朗普兰克最博学的人之一，尤其在宗教经文与古老民俗方面。科尔维与神殿的其他祭司欢迎平衡之诸多神祇的任何追随者，甚至也欢迎那些敬奉更古老或更奇异信仰的人，例如艾尔德。尽管有人更偏好自己的私人家中神社，但朗普兰克的许多虔诚市民都乐于在这座传奇的塔鲁奇中祈祷、奉献什一税并赎罪。众多翼区又进一步划分为一个个独立的壁龛，其中大多数都陈列着一尊独特的雕像，描绘靛蓝群岛各地所崇拜的无数神祇之一。神殿本体之下是朗普兰克地下墓穴，许多著名朗普兰克人的遗骸（其中最引人注目的是波比·冯·巴纳克尔所信赖的克拉格拉克同伴石沟的温达约的尘骨）被安葬在砂岩陵寝、墓室与骨龛之中。

All are welcome to worship the Balance at the Temple of Many Colors—except demon worshippers, of course. The temple's g'mayun high priest, Prismatic Colvi, is one of the most knowledgeable men in Rumplank, particularly when it comes to religious scripture and old folklore. Colvi and the other priests of the temple welcome followers of any of the Balance's many deities, and even those who venerate older or stranger faiths, such as the Eld. While some prefer their own personal home shrines, many of Rumplank's pious citizens are happy to pray, tithe, and atone at this legendary taruki. Numerous wings are further subdivided into discrete alcoves, most of which feature a distinct statue depicting any of the myriad gods worshipped throughout the Indigo Isles. Beneath the temple proper are the Rumplank Catacombs, where the remains of many famous Rumplankers (including, most notably, the dust of Poppy von Barnacle's trusted kragrak companion, Undayo of Stonegulch) are interred in sandstone mausoleums, crypts, and loculi.

11. Quill & Scroll Academy.name: 11. 羽笔与卷轴学院 11. Quill & Scroll Academy
11. Quill & Scroll Academy.text:
伦普兰克研究、实践与发展奥术魔法的首要中心是“羽笔与卷轴学院”。如同伦普兰克城堡一样，学院的建造在伦普兰克文艺复兴期间由红色的阿拉霍斯科监督完成，然而学校的建筑风格与城堡迥然不同。学院的中央大厅由经魔法保存的wo'a硬木与被弯折成有机形态的熟铁栏杆构成，形状如同交织的棕榈叶或海蛇。五座由熔岩石精心打磨并层层堆砌而成的尖塔自中央大厅边缘拔地而起，每一座都在港口天际线上勾勒出令人惊叹的剪影。此后数年间在学院上增建的附楼，则使用了松木与粗糙熔岩石等成本低得多的材料，不过，将耐人寻味或不寻常的设计融入建筑的传统始终延续不辍。过去十年里，学院传奇的火术师发起了一场规模浩大的战役，将学院数百扇老旧窗户更换为新窗格；他们用从附近“缥缈海岸”开采的过热细砂，逐片打造出新的玻璃板。

“羽笔与卷轴学院”现任教员领袖是著名的g'mayun变形学派施法者校长乌奥科，她沉着寡言、深不可测，是一位兼具教授与研究者身份、拥有数十年经验的学者。学术共同体中其他值得一提的人物包括：学校杰出的火山学家兼元素使，一位名为莫胡米·阿阿兰的kragrak女性；以及冷酷无情的男性orpok——教授魔法制桶术的拉库·达里诺。

Rumplank's preeminent center for the study, practice, and development of arcane magic is the Quill & Scroll Academy. Like Castle Rumplank, the academy's construction was overseen by Arahosko the Red during the Rumplank Renaissance, though the school is of a markedly different architectural style than the castle. The academy's central hall is constructed from magically preserved wo'a hardwood and wrought iron bars bent into organic shapes like interwoven palm fronds or sea serpents. Five spires of painstakingly smoothed and stacked lava stone rise from the periphery of the central hall, each cutting an impressive silhouette against the harbor skyline. Annexes built onto the academy over the intervening years are made from far less costly materials like pine and rough lava stone, though the tradition of incorporating intriguing or unusual designs into the architecture has remained steady. Over the last decade, the college's legendary pyromancers have undertaken a tremendous campaign to replace the academy's hundreds of aging windows with new panes, crafting each new sheet of glass from superheated fine sand excavated from nearby Wispy Strand.

The Quill & Scroll Academy's current faculty head is the famous g'mayun transmuter Headmistress U'oko, a stoic, inscrutable scholar with decades of experience as both a professor and a researcher. Other notable members of the academic community include the school's distinguished volcanologist and elementalist, a kragrak woman named Mohumi A'aran, and the ruthless male orpok professor of magical cooperage, Raku Darino.

12. Captain's Club.name: 12. 船长俱乐部 12. Captain's Club
12. Captain's Club.text:
表面上，任何拥有船只的船长都欢迎与那些经常出没于船长俱乐部的老水手们一起畅饮；船长俱乐部是朗姆街最古老（也最破败）的酒馆。然而事实上，它的老板——法罗瑟的乔乔里船长努波·风暴杠——以及俱乐部里的资深酒鬼，鲜少会长久容忍新来者。潜在的顾客不仅会被其他饮酒者冷眼相待，也会遭到风暴杠船长的冷遇；而那些不识趣的人，可能会发现自己被扔到外面泥泞的街道上。酒吧的排外态度惹恼了许多被驱逐的酒客，尤其是附近爪击区的无赖们；其中许多人经常向船长俱乐部的成员发起街头斗殴挑战，或试图破坏风暴杠船长那艘令人生畏的双桅纵帆船“铁旋风”。

风暴杠的跑堂兼大副希利·补丁，是一名男性哈德里根水手，对崭露头角的航海者总有几分怜惜。别告诉风暴杠船长，但希利有时会偷偷与那些被船长俱乐部赶走的人碰面，并提供建议，教他们如何打动风暴杠船长或其他常客。想要获得常客们的认可并没有万无一失的办法，单纯带来一瓶稀有朗姆酒通常也不够。希利最好的建议是参加——并赢下——每月一次的滚桶竞速。参赛者必须在翻滚着沿朗姆街一路下坡的空酒桶上保持平衡；第一个连同自己的酒桶（以及自己的身体）完好无损抵达底部的人获胜。已经有三年没有船长俱乐部以外的人赢得备受尊崇的“滚桶跑者”头衔了。

Any skipper with a ship is ostensibly welcome to drink alongside the salty dogs who regularly haunt the Captain's Club, Rum Row's oldest (and dingiest) drinking establishment. In truth, however, its proprietor, the farose chochori captain Nupor Stormbar, and the club's veteran topers rarely brook newcomers for long. Prospective patrons are liable to get the cold shoulder from not only their fellow imbibers, but also Captain Stormbar, and those who don't take the hint might find themselves tossed onto the muddy streets outside. The bar's exclusivity has rubbed many exiled drinkers the wrong way, particularly scallywags from nearby Claw Quarter, many of whom regularly challenge Captain's Club members to street brawls or attempt to sabotage Captain Stormbar's formidable brigantine, the Iron Cyclone.

Stormbar's barback and first mate, Heely Patches, is a male hardriggan sailor with a soft spot for up-and-coming seafarers. Don't tell Captain Stormbar, but Heely will sometimes secretly meet with those who've been ousted from the Captain's Club and offer advice on how to impress Captain Stormbar or the other patrons. There's no surefire way to gain the regulars' approval, and simply bringing in a rare bottle of rum typically won't cut it. Heely's best suggestion is to participate in—and win—the monthly barrel-racing contest. Contenders must balance atop spent liquor barrels as they tumble down Rum Row; the first to the bottom with their barrel (and their body) intact wins. It's been three years since anyone outside the Captain's Club has won the esteemed title of barrel runner.

13. Lost Crooner's Hall.name: 13. 失落的歌者大厅 13. Lost Crooner's Hall
13. Lost Crooner's Hall.text:
来自靛蓝群岛各地的艺术赞助人会乘船前往朗普兰克，只为有机会在这座城市最著名的表演厅欣赏演出。导演与剧团在失落歌者大厅每周昼夜不息地呈现种类繁多的演出——从一群明目张胆地喧闹（却无可否认才华横溢）的水手合唱团高唱经典海船歌，到由该城首席剧作家撰写、并由最优秀的舞台演员演绎的、柔肠寸断的温柔歌剧。为了在剧院获得头牌位置，吟游诗人可以选择在无数普通背景演员的行列中一步步往上爬，与同样争夺荣誉的人竞争；或者也可以试着拦下并亲自打动大厅里的一位常驻舞台导演，比如以反复无常闻名的雄性克拉格拉克导演雷霆之达奥洛，或是和蔼却不可靠的雌性格梅云导演金眼乌尔莎。

许多著名表演者曾在失落歌者大厅登台，这座富有传奇色彩的木质建筑也曾发生过许多著名的历史事件，既有滑稽也有悲剧。凡是当时在场者，几乎无人会忘记埃波加德·洪米斯演出《红羽葬礼》时那令人痉挛般的爆笑；同样，也没有人能抹去那段记忆：在阿卡尔·迪姆森命中注定的最终场《佩尔塞诺与努娜拉》中，一名卑劣的谢幕召唤者在舞台中央显现，夺走了台上无辜演员的性命。在极其俊美潇洒的加茨韦尔·安德温德——一位雄性格梅云演员（有人说他看起来与靛蓝艺术家协会的艺术家里基·阿莱夫惊人地相似）——之外，失落歌者大厅目前轮演阵容中最著名的演员，是美丽而才华横溢的杰玛丽娜·罗斯温特。这位格梅云舞台演员是公认的天才，也是靛蓝群岛历史学会多部著作的出版成员，尽管她作为一名地区知名女演员的日程已相当繁忙。

Patrons of the arts from all over the Indigo Isles sail to Rumplank for a chance to catch shows at the city's most famous performance hall. Directors and troupes conduct a wide variety of performances at the Lost Crooner's Hall every day and night of the week, ranging from choirs of patently rowdy (but undeniably talented) sailors singing classic sea shanties to heartbreakingly tender operas written by the city's leading playwrights and acted out by its finest thespians. To gain top billing at the theater, bards can either attempt to work their way up through the ranks of the countless common background actors all vying for similar honors, or they can attempt to waylay and personally wow one of the hall's regular stage directors, such as the notoriously fickle male kragrak director Daolo of Thunder or the gracious but unreliable female g'mayun director Ulsa Goldeyes.

Many famous performers have graced the Lost Crooner's Hall, and the storied wooden structure has also been the site of many notable historical events, both comic and tragic. Few who were present will ever forget the convulsion-inducing hilarity of Epogard Hunmyth's performance of "Funeral for a Redfeather," just as no one can shake the memory of when a vile curtain caller manifested in the middle of Arkal Dimsun's final, fated showing of "Perseno and Nunala" and claimed the lives of the innocent players on stage. Alongside the outrageously handsome and dashing Gatswel Underwind, a male g'mayun actor (who some say looks suspiciously like the artist Riki Alive from The Indigo Artists' Collective), the Lost Crooner's Hall's most famous actor currently in rotation is the beautiful and brilliant Jemalina Rosewinter. The g'mayun thespian is a certified genius and a multiple-published member of the Indigo Isles Historical Society, despite her busy schedule as a regionally famous actress.

14. Malabria's Mechanical Miscellany.name: 14. 玛拉布里娅的机械杂集 14. Malabria's Mechanical Miscellany
14. Malabria's Mechanical Miscellany.text:
朗普兰克最出色的修补匠、自称最伟大的智者——法拉尼·马拉布里亚——同时也是城里最不擅经营的店主之一，至少在财务头脑方面如此，活脱脱就是那种心不在焉的发明家刻板印象。她制造种类繁多的音乐机器、谜盒、冒险用小装置、家宅防御机关以及其他新奇古怪的创新玩意，但迄今为止她最令人惊叹的作品，是一系列能够执行复杂指令的机械人偶。这些人偶大多数时候都一动不动地站在她的店里各处，但它们都有个令人不安的习惯：总会在顾客背后悄无声息地移动或变换姿势——这种效果通常会把新顾客吓得魂飞魄散。尽管许多朗普兰克人都请求购买一个，法拉尼却坚持这些美丽而精巧的构装体不出售。相反，她会把顾客指向店内货架、表面与箱笼中摆满的数百件迷人、奇妙又令人困惑的小饰品。

而也正是在这里，法拉尼的经商方式便令人质疑：她对商品的定价至少可以说是随机的，更常见的情况则完全是荒诞不经。在“机械杂珍馆”那凌乱的货架间，既有只需区区小钱就能买到的奇珍——比如一个以最上等黄铜制成、精准呈现已知太阳系的模型，仅售两枚银币——也有贴着离谱高价的彻底垃圾——例如一个用浮木做成、关节不能活动的木偶要十枚金币，或是一把断裂的匕首，法拉尼只愿用一整块实心铂金锭来交换。许多人还没来得及发现店内的诸多宝藏，便已厌恶地拂袖而去；但这似乎从未让法拉尼在意，她总是日复一日地待在柜台后，摆弄着某项新的发明来消磨时光。

法拉尼在朗普兰克几乎没有固定买家，朋友更是寥寥无几；然而不知为何，她竟总能让狭窄工坊里的光亮着，而且几乎每个月她家门口都会收到一批进口的制作材料。有些人猜测，她的家族——而她又是唯一活着的后裔——曾富可敌国，她只是用继承的财产来资助本质上不过是兴趣爱好的事情。另一些流言则不那么友善，揣测法拉尼一定是靠替“爪击区”的某个街头帮派敲诈其他商家来弄到钱，或是夜里兼职当个嗜杀的海盗，甚至更糟。若有人问起，法拉尼只会大笑，并将这些肮脏的流言斥为那些缺乏视野之人的嫉妒。

Rumplank's best tinker and self-proclaimed greatest intellect, Falarni Malabria, is also one of the city's least proficient business owners, at least in terms of financial acumen, embodying the trope of the absentminded inventor. She produces a wide variety of music machines, puzzle boxes, adventuring gadgets, home defense mechanisms, and other innovative oddities, but her most impressive creations by far are a line of mechanized mannequins capable of carrying out complex instructions. These mannequins stand about her store motionless most of the time, but they all have the disconcerting habit of silently moving or changing poses behind shoppers' backs—an effect which typically scares the rum out of new customers. Though many Rumplankers have asked to buy one, Falarni insists these beautiful, intricate constructs aren't for sale. Instead, she points patrons to any of the hundreds of fascinating, wonderful, and befuddling trinkets that fill the shelves, tables, and crates of her shop.

And here is where Falarni's mercantile methods come into question, for the pricing of her wares is random, to say the least, and more often simply nonsensical. Scattered among the cluttered shelves of the Mechanical Miscellany are wonders to be had for a pittance—say, an accurate model of the known solar system made of the finest brass, for sale for a mere two silver pieces— as well as literal junk with an exorbitant price tag—a non-articulating wooden doll made from driftwood for ten gold pieces, for example, or a broken dagger, which Falarni will part with only in exchange for a solid platinum ingot. Many leave her shop in disgust before discovering any of its many treasures, though this never seems to bother Falarni, who steadily whiles away the day fiddling with one or another new invention from behind the sales counter.

Falarni has few regular buyers and even fewer friends in Rumplank, yet somehow she manages to keep the lights on in her cramped workshop, with shipments of imported crafting materials arriving at her doorstep almost monthly. Some hypothesize that her family, of which she is the only living descendent, was fabulously wealthy, and she uses her inheritance to fund what is essentially just a hobby. Other rumors aren't so kind, speculating that Falarni must attain her money by extorting other businesses for one of the Claw Quarter's street gangs, moonlighting as a murderous pirate, or worse. If asked, Falarni laughs and dismisses such seedy rumors as the jealousy of those who lack vision.

15. Pinkwater Well.name: 15. 粉水井 15. Pinkwater Well
15. Pinkwater Well.text:
桶子广场那永不枯竭的掺水红酒泉是朗普兰克最广为人知的名胜之一。年轻的g'mayun们被教导说，醉酒的守护神祖尔卢（Xurlu）负责这口井的魔法供给；但幻灭的成年人更清楚，真正负责让这座城市主要饮用水水源既安全（又有趣）的，是大祭司棱彩科尔维（Prismatic Colvi）及其神职人员。

Barrel Square's never-ending spring of watered-down red wine is one of Rumplank's best-known points of interest. Young g'mayuns are taught that the patron god of drunkenness, Xurlu, is responsible for the well's magical supply, but disillusioned adults know better, that it is high priest Prismatic Colvi and his clergy who are responsible for keeping the city's main source of drinking water safe (and fun).

16. Garardi's School For Scamps & Scally.name: 16. 加拉尔迪的恶作剧与无赖学校 16. Garardi's School For Scamps & Scallywags
16. Garardi's School For Scamps & Scally.text:
许多人将波比·冯·藤壶的失踪与推定的死亡视为悲剧，而已故的贾兹珀·加拉尔迪却看到了机会。他为有志成为海盗与想当海盗船长的家伙们建立了自己的训练设施，并许诺任何从他学校毕业的人，都会像波比那支传奇船员中的任何一位那样精通花剑手技艺。实际上，大多数学生离开加拉尔迪学校时带走的唯一东西，不过是更瘪的钱袋和满脑子可疑的航海箴言。

尽管在其原主人在世时它就谈不上是什么体面的学院，如今的加拉尔迪学校更不受尊重——因为它由臭名昭著的雄性g'mayun诈骗艺人“血尾船长”经营。老朗姆普兰克人尽皆知：只有那些钱多到胜过常识的人，才会去申请进入“加拉尔迪恶作剧者与无赖学校”。

Where many saw Poppy von Barnacle's disappearance and presumed death as a tragedy, the late Jazper Garardi saw opportunity. He established his training facility for aspiring pirates and wannabe buccaneers with the promise that anyone who graduated from his school would be as skilled a swashbuckler as any member of Poppy's legendary crew. In actuality, the only thing with which most students left Garardi's School was a lighter coin purse and a head full of dubious seafaring apothegms.

Though it was hardly a reputable academy in the day of its original owner, Garardi's School commands even less respect now, overseen as it is by the infamous male g'mayun confidence artist, Captain Bloodtail. It's a commonly known fact in Old Rumplank that only those with more coin than common sense should seek admission to Garardi's School for Scamps & Scallywags.

17. The Rumpled Feather.name: 17. 皱褶之羽 17. The Rumpled Feather
17. The Rumpled Feather.text:
许多新来者和老资格常客都最喜欢的一家酒馆，是一座色彩斑斓、由船屋改建而成的饮酒大厅，名为“皱羽”。当地著名的前海盗克拉玛迪尼娅“迪尼”瓦卡马尔西斯在她和已故兄弟泽德加雅决定从私掠生涯中退休后，与他一起创办了这门生意。当泽德加雅患上一种神秘疾病并在一个温暖的雨夜意外去世时，所有人都以为悲痛中的迪尼会关掉皱羽。然而，酒保却倾尽所有来维持这家店的生存。许多人相信，迪尼保持这种拼命般的工作作风是为了创造一份能让她兄弟为之自豪的遗产；不过，被掏空之蛇的老板莫洛“致病”多戈多尔声称，迪尼只是尽可能让自己忙碌，以避免沉溺于痛苦回忆，并让自己从他所说困扰着她这家店的闹鬼之事中分心。

每周无论哪一晚，都有数不清的“皱木板帮”成员定期在这家宽敞酒馆的某个大厅里用餐或饮酒。帕拉米·古德温德加入皱羽的时间相对较短，但她已迅速成为其他常客的心头好。这位年轻而神秘的g'mayun占卜师能使用她的活占卜牌组，为顾客给出惊人准确的预言，并解读他们眼前的未来。不幸的是，胆怯的古德温德的预言会被她令人难受的害羞与无法传达坏消息的缺点严重拖累。

The favorite tavern of many newcomers and old-timers alike is a colorful boathouse-turned-drinking hall called the Rumpled Feather. The famous local ex-pirate Clamardinia "Dini" Wakamarsis started the business with her late brother Zedegaya after the two decided to retire from privateering. When Zedegaya fell ill with a mysterious illness and unexpectedly died one warm rainy evening, everyone expected Dini to shutter the Rumpled Feather in her grief. Instead, however, the barkeep threw everything she had into keeping the establishment alive. Many believe that Dini maintains her breakneck work ethic to create a legacy that her brother would be proud of, though the proprietor of the Gutted Snake, Molo "Make-Sick" Dogodor, claims that Dini simply keeps as busy as possible to avoid dwelling on painful memories and to distract herself from a haunting he claims plagues her establishment.

Countless Rumplankers regularly dine or drink in one of the expansive tavern's halls on any given night of the week. Palarmi Goodwind is a relatively recent addition to the Rumpled Feather, though she's become a fast favorite among its other regulars. The young and mysterious g'mayun fortune teller can use her living divination deck to give customers startlingly accurate predictions and read into their immediate futures. Unfortunately, the timorous Goodwind's predictions are drastically hindered by her painful shyness and inability to deliver bad news.

18. Harmony Hattery.name: 18. 和谐帽坊 18. Harmony Hattery
18. Harmony Hattery.text:
